words.thaiTranslation: น่ารื่นรมย์ / ยินดียิ่ง (na ruen-rom)

words.definition: To receive money as payment for work that you do.
words.exampleSentence: She works part-time to earn money for university.
words.laoTranslation: ຫາເງິນ / ໄດ້ຮັບ (ha nguen / dai hab)
words.thaiTranslation: หาเงิน / ได้รับ (ha ngen / dai-rap)

words.definition: Belonging to or coming from another country.
words.exampleSentence: Learning a foreign language requires daily practice.
words.laoTranslation: ຕ່າງປະເທດ (tang pa-thet)
words.thaiTranslation: ต่างประเทศ (tang-pra-thet)

words.definition: Come together or bring together into one group.
words.exampleSentence: They gather flowers in the garden.
words.laoTranslation: ຮວບຮວມ (huab huam)
words.thaiTranslation: รวบรวม (ruam ruam)

words.definition: Telling the truth and not hiding things.
words.exampleSentence: To be honest, I didn't like the food very much.
words.laoTranslation: ຊື່ສັດ (xeu sat)
words.thaiTranslation: ซื่อสัตย์ (su-sat)

words.definition: To make something better or to become better.
words.exampleSentence: Your English will improve if you study every day.
words.laoTranslation: ປັບປຸງ / ພັດທະນາ (pab pung / phat-tha-na)
words.thaiTranslation: ปรับปรุง / พัฒนา (prap-prung / phat-tha-na)

words.definition: An act of traveling from one place to another.
words.exampleSentence: Their journey to the mountains took three hours.
words.laoTranslation: ການເດີນທາງ (kan dern thang)
words.thaiTranslation: การเดินทาง (kan deanthang)

words.definition: A room or area where food is prepared and cooked.
words.exampleSentence: She is cooking dinner in the kitchen.
words.laoTranslation: ຫ້ອງຄົວ (hong khua)
words.thaiTranslation: ห้องครัว (hong khrua)

words.definition: Relating to the present or recent times.
words.exampleSentence: The city has many modern buildings.
words.laoTranslation: ທັນສະໄໝ (than samay)
words.thaiTranslation: ทันสมัย (than samai)

words.definition: Of small width in proportion to length.
words.exampleSentence: The car drove down a narrow street.
words.laoTranslation: ແຄບ (khep)
words.thaiTranslation: แคบ (khaep)

words.definition: To ask someone if they would like to have something.
words.exampleSentence: They offered me a cup of tea when I arrived.
words.laoTranslation: ສະເໜີ / ໃຫ້ (sa-noe / hai)
words.thaiTranslation: เสนอ / มอบให้ (sa-noe / mop-hai)

words.definition: Enjoyable, attractive, friendly, or easy to like.
words.exampleSentence: The weather was very pleasant during our morning walk.
words.laoTranslation: ໜ້າເພີດເພີນ / ສະບາຍ (na phoet phoen / sa-bai)
words.thaiTranslation: รื่นรมย์ / เป็นมิตร (ruen-rom / pen-mit)

words.definition: To get or be given something.
words.exampleSentence: I received an email from my teacher yesterday.
words.laoTranslation: ໄດ້ຮັບ (dai hab)
words.thaiTranslation: ได้รับ (dai-rap)

words.definition: Correct in all details; exact.
words.exampleSentence: The weather forecast was accurate.
words.laoTranslation: ຖືກຕ້ອງແນ່ນອນ (theuk tong nenon)
words.thaiTranslation: ถูกต้องแม่นยำ (thuk tong maen yam)

words.definition: Confused and uncertain.
words.exampleSentence: The tourist looked bewildered by the complex train map.
words.laoTranslation: ງົງງັນ / ສັບສົນ (ngong ngan / sab son)
words.thaiTranslation: งุนงง / สับสน (ngun-ngong / sap-son)

words.definition: A result of a particular action or situation, often one that is bad.
words.exampleSentence: If you don't study, you will face the consequences.
words.laoTranslation: ຜົນທີ່ຕາມມາ (phon thi tam ma)
words.thaiTranslation: ผลที่ตามมา (phon thi tam-ma)

words.definition: Severe and sudden or having a very noticeable effect.
words.exampleSentence: The company had to make drastic changes to save money.
words.laoTranslation: ຮຸນແຮງ / ເດັດຂາດ (hun haeng / det khat)
words.thaiTranslation: รุนแรง / เฉียบขาด (run-raeng / chiap-khat)

words.definition: Achieving maximum productivity with minimum wasted effort.
words.exampleSentence: The new software makes our work more efficient.
words.laoTranslation: ມີປະສິດທິພາບ (mi pa sit thi phab)
words.thaiTranslation: มีประสิทธิภาพ (mi pra sit thi phap)

words.definition: Feeling annoyed or less confident because you cannot achieve what you want.
words.exampleSentence: He felt frustrated when the computer kept crashing.
words.laoTranslation: ອຸກອັ່ງ / ທໍ້ແທ້ (uk ang / thor thae)
words.thaiTranslation: หงุดหงิน / ท้อแท้ใจ (ngut-ngit / tho-thae-chai)

words.definition: A brief or quick look at something.
words.exampleSentence: I caught a glimpse of the celebrity as she left the hotel.
words.laoTranslation: เหลือບເບິ່ງ (leuap beung)
words.thaiTranslation: เหลือบมอง / ชำเลือง (luap-mong)

words.definition: Dangerous and involving risk, especially to someone's health.
words.exampleSentence: Chemical waste is classified as hazardous material.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນອັນຕະລາຍ (pen an-ta-lai)
words.thaiTranslation: อันตราย / เสี่ยงภัย (an-ta-rai / siang-phai)

words.definition: Something that encourages a person to do something or work harder.
words.exampleSentence: The bonus acts as an incentive for employees to meet their targets.
words.laoTranslation: ສິ່ງຈູງໃຈ (sing chung chai)
words.thaiTranslation: สิ่งจูงใจ / สิ่งกระตุ้น (sing chung-chai)

words.definition: Producing a lot of money or profit.
words.exampleSentence: Real estate investment can be a highly lucrative business.
words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ເຮັດກຳໄລໄດ້ດີ (thi het kam-lai dai di)
words.thaiTranslation: ที่ทำกำไรงาม / มีผลกำไรดี (thi tham kam-rai ngam)

words.definition: To try to reach an agreement or compromise through active professional discussion and alignment.
words.exampleSentence: Advisors help local farmers negotiate fair contract terms with international transport brokers.
words.laoTranslation: ເຈລະຈາ / ຕໍ່ຮອງ
words.thaiTranslation: เจรจาต่อรอง / ปรึกษาหารือราคา

words.definition: An extremely strong desire to obtain money and possessions.
words.exampleSentence: The corporate world is often criticized for its pure avarice.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມໂລບມາກໂລພາ (khuam lop mak lop pha)
words.thaiTranslation: ความโลภจัด / ความตะกละตะกลาม (khwam lop-chat)

words.definition: Intended for or likely to be understood by only a small number of people with specialized knowledge.
words.exampleSentence: He gave a lecture on an esoteric ancient philosophy.
words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ເຂົ້າໃຈຍາກ / ສະເພາະກຸ່ມ (thi khao chai nyak)
words.thaiTranslation: ที่เข้าใจยากเฉพาะกลุ่ม / ลึกซึ้ง (thi khao-chai yak cha-phoh klum)

words.definition: Fresh and clean; uncorrupted; in its original condition.
words.exampleSentence: The eco-resort overlooks a pristine white sand beach.
words.laoTranslation: ບໍລິສຸດ / ດັ່ງເດີມ (bo-li-sut / dang doem)
words.thaiTranslation: บริสุทธิ์ / ไร้รอยมลทิน (bo-ri-sut / rai roi mon-thin)

words.definition: To stop sleeping and become awake.
words.exampleSentence: I wake up early every day to work in the garden.
words.laoTranslation: ຕື່ນນອນ
words.thaiTranslation: ตื่นนอน (tuen non)

words.definition: To physically get out of bed after waking up.
words.exampleSentence: I wake up early but I get up around 6:30 AM.
words.laoTranslation: ລຸກຂຶ້ນ (luk khuen)
words.thaiTranslation: ลุกขึ้นจากเตียง (luk-khuen)

words.definition: To enter a physical room, structure, or specialized zone.
words.exampleSentence: Please come in and check the satellite imagery display console.
words.laoTranslation: ເຂົ້າມາ (khao-ma)
words.thaiTranslation: เข้ามาข้างใน (khao-ma)

words.definition: To reposition your physical torso onto a chair or platform seat framework.
words.exampleSentence: Please sit down and let us map out the opportunity cost vectors.
words.laoTranslation: ນັ່ງລົງ (nang-long)
words.thaiTranslation: นั่งลง (nang-long)

words.definition: To leave a residential or office setting, especially to eat or network.
words.exampleSentence: The team members usually go out for local food after a long survey.
words.laoTranslation: ອອກໄປຂ້າງນອກ (ok-pai)
words.thaiTranslation: ออกไปข้างนอก (ok-pai-khang-nok)

words.definition: To stop working because of a mechanical or electrical fault.
words.exampleSentence: Our old truck broke down on the way to the market.
words.laoTranslation: ເພ / ເສຍ (phe / sia)
words.thaiTranslation: เสีย / พัง / รถเสีย (sia / phang)

words.definition: To establish, construct, or configure a facility, enterprise, or digital platform.
words.exampleSentence: The union aims to set up a dedicated center for monitoring agricultural standards.
words.laoTranslation: ສ້າງຕັ້ງ / ຕິດຕັ້ງ
words.thaiTranslation: จัดตั้ง / ติดตั้ง / ก่อตั้ง

words.definition: To return something to the person who owns it.
words.exampleSentence: Make sure you give back the library books on Friday.
words.laoTranslation: ຄືນໃຫ້ / ສົ່ງຄືນ (khuen hai / song khuen)
words.thaiTranslation: คืนให้ / ส่งคืน (khuen-hai)

words.definition: To start doing a new activity or hobby regularly.
words.exampleSentence: My father decided to take up photography during retirement.
words.laoTranslation: ເລີ່ມເຮັດກິດຈະກຳໃໝ່ (loem het kit-cha-kam mai)
words.thaiTranslation: เริ่มทำ (งานอดิเรกหรือกิจกรรมใหม่) (roem-tham)

words.definition: To add more details or information to a basic plan, idea, or outline.
words.exampleSentence: We need to work on fleshing out the draft proposal before the board meeting.
words.laoTranslation: ເພີ່ມລາຍລະອຽດໃຫ້ສົມບູນ (phoem lai la-iad hai som-bun)
words.thaiTranslation: ขยายความ / เพิ่มรายละเอียดให้สมบูรณ์ (kha-yai khwam)

words.definition: To do something wrong or incorrect.
words.exampleSentence: It is okay to make a mistake as long as you learn from it.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດຜິດພາດ (het phid phat)
words.thaiTranslation: ทำผิดพลาด (tham phit-phlat)

words.definition: To use a camera to capture an image.
words.exampleSentence: Could you please take a photo of us in front of the stupa?
words.laoTranslation: ຖ່າຍຮູບ (thai hup)
words.thaiTranslation: ถ่ายรูป (thai-rup)

words.definition: To eat the first meal of the day.
words.exampleSentence: I usually have breakfast at 7 AM.
words.laoTranslation: ກິນເຂົ້າເຊົ້າ (kin khao xao)
words.thaiTranslation: กินข้าวเช้า (kin khao chao)

words.definition: To visit stores to purchase goods.
words.exampleSentence: We will go shopping this weekend.
words.laoTranslation: ໄປຊື້ເຄື່ອງ (pai xeu kheuang)
words.thaiTranslation: ไปซื้อของ (pai sue khong)

words.definition: To convey completely verified facts and transparent data metrics accurately out loud.
words.exampleSentence: Satellite layers tell the truth about commercial logging expansion indices over decades.
words.laoTranslation: ເວົ້າຄວາມຈິງ (wao-khuam-ching)
words.thaiTranslation: พูดความจริง / แสดงข้อเท็จจริง (phut-khwam-ching)

words.definition: To complete school assignments at home.
words.exampleSentence: I need to do my homework before dinner.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດວຽກບ້ານ (het viak ban)
words.thaiTranslation: ทำการบ้าน (tham kam ban)

words.definition: To keep money for future use instead of spending it.
words.exampleSentence: I am trying to save money to buy a new smartphone.
words.laoTranslation: ປະຢັດເງິນ / ເກັບເງິນ (pa-yad nguen / keb nguen)
words.thaiTranslation: ประหยัดเงิน / ออมเงิน (pra-yat ngen)

words.definition: An expression used to wish someone success.
words.exampleSentence: Good luck with your English exam tomorrow!
words.laoTranslation: ໂຊກດີ (xok di)
words.thaiTranslation: โชคดี (chok-di)

words.definition: To refrain from speaking or making noise.
words.exampleSentence: Please keep quiet during the scientific presentation.
words.laoTranslation: ຮັກສາຄວາມງຽບ
words.thaiTranslation: รักษาความเงียบ

words.definition: To enjoy oneself or experience an enjoyable time.
words.exampleSentence: Have fun on your weekend trip to Chiang Mai!
words.laoTranslation: ມ່ວນຊື່ນ
words.thaiTranslation: ขอให้สนุก / สนุกสนาน (kho hai sa nook / sa nook sa nan)

words.definition: To require or consume a considerable duration of hours or days.
words.exampleSentence: Rendering complex topographical raster layers will always take time.
words.laoTranslation: ໃຊ້ເວລາ (xai-we-la)
words.thaiTranslation: ใช้เวลา / ต้องใช้เวลาสักระยะ (chai-we-la)

words.definition: To feel extremely sorry or sad about a past action.
words.exampleSentence: I deeply regret not taking that overseas job opportunity.
words.laoTranslation: ເສຍໃຈຢ່າງເລິກເຊິ່ງ (sia chai yang lek seng)
words.thaiTranslation: เสียใจอย่างสุดซึ้ง (sia-chai yang sut-sueng)

words.definition: To achieve a mutual decision or deal after discussing it.
words.exampleSentence: The lawyers managed to reach an agreement out of court.
words.laoTranslation: ບັນລຸຂໍ້ຕົກລົງ (ban lu kho tok long)
words.thaiTranslation: บรรลุข้อตกลง (ban-lu kho-tok-long)

words.definition: To find an answer or solution to a difficulty.
words.exampleSentence: We held a brainstorming session to solve the coding problem.
words.laoTranslation: ແກ້ໄຂບັນຫາ (kae khai ban ha)
words.thaiTranslation: แก้ไขปัญหา (kae-khai pan-ha)

words.definition: A general agreement shared by a wide group of people.
words.exampleSentence: There is a broad consensus that climate change needs urgent action.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມເຫັນພ້ອງຕ້ອງກັນສ່ວນໃຫຍ່ (khuam hen phong tong kan suan yai)
words.thaiTranslation: ความเห็นพ้องต้องกันส่วนใหญ่ (khwam hen-phong)

words.definition: To consider particular facts when making a decision.
words.exampleSentence: We must take into account the budget limits before planning.
words.laoTranslation: ຄຳນຶງເຖິງ / ເອົາໃຈໃສ່ (kham neung theung)
words.thaiTranslation: พิจารณา / คำนึงถึง (phi-cha-ra-na)

words.definition: Very helpful or advantageous.
words.exampleSentence: Regular cardio exercise is highly beneficial for heart health.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນປະໂຫຍດຫຼາຍ (pen pa-nyot lai)
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นประโยชน์อย่างยิ่ง (pen pra-yot yang-ying)

words.definition: To voice worry or anxiety about a specific situation.
words.exampleSentence: Local residents expressed concern over the safety of the new bridge.
words.laoTranslation: ສະແດງຄວາມເປັນຫ່ວງ (sa-daeng khuam pen huang)
words.thaiTranslation: แสดงความกังวลใจ / เป็นห่วง (sa-daeng khwam kang-won)

words.definition: A discouraging or frightening effect, especially on freedom of speech.
words.exampleSentence: The harsh new security laws had a chilling effect on local journalism.
words.laoTranslation: ຜົນກະທົບທີ່ເຮັດໃຫ້ຢ້ານກົວ / ຫຼຸດເສລີພາບ (phon ka-thob thi het hai yan kua)
words.thaiTranslation: ผลกระทบที่ทำให้หวาดกลัวหรือลดทอนเสรีภาพ (phon kra-thop thi tham hai wat-klua)

words.definition: Extremely clean; completely free from dirt or contamination.
words.exampleSentence: The hospital laboratory must be kept scrupulously clean at all times.
words.laoTranslation: ສະອາດບໍລິສຸດ / ປອດເຊື້ອຢ່າງສິ້ນເຊີງ (sa-at bo-li-sut)
words.thaiTranslation: สะอาดหมดจดอย่างไร้ที่ติ (sa-at mot-chot)

words.definition: To take and use something that belongs to someone else, with the intention of returning it.
words.exampleSentence: Can I borrow your pen for a second?
words.laoTranslation: ຢືມ (yuem)
words.thaiTranslation: ยืม (yuem)

words.definition: A period of one hundred years.
words.exampleSentence: This historic structure was built over a century ago.
words.laoTranslation: ສະຕະວັດ (sa-ta-wat)
words.thaiTranslation: ศตวรรษ (sa-ta-wat)

words.definition: Having a very pleasant taste or smell.
words.exampleSentence: The noodle soup at the market was delicious.
words.laoTranslation: ແຊບ (xaep)
words.thaiTranslation: อร่อย (a-roi)

words.definition: To travel through an unfamiliar area to learn about it.
words.exampleSentence: They want to explore the local forest next week.
words.laoTranslation: ສໍາຫຼວດ
words.thaiTranslation: สำรวจ / ค้นหา (sam ruat)

words.definition: Known about by many people across the country or world.
words.exampleSentence: Luang Prabang is famous for its ancient temples.
words.laoTranslation: ມີຊື່ສຽງ
words.thaiTranslation: มีชื่อเสียง

words.definition: A person or book that shows the way or provides information.
words.exampleSentence: Our tour guide explained the history of the royal palace.
words.laoTranslation: ຜູ້ນຳທ່ຽວ / ແນະນຳ (phu nam thiao / nae nam)
words.thaiTranslation: ผู้นำเที่ยว / แนะนำ (phu-nam thiao)

words.definition: Strong and well; not sick.
words.exampleSentence: Eating fresh vegetables keeps you healthy.
words.laoTranslation: ມີສຸຂະພາບດີ (mi su-kha-phap di)
words.thaiTranslation: สุขภาพดี (su-kha-phap di)

words.definition: A piece of land completely surrounded by water.
words.exampleSentence: Si Phan Don means the Four Thousand Islands in southern Laos.
words.laoTranslation: ເກາະ / ດອນ (koh / don)
words.thaiTranslation: เกาะ (koh)

words.definition: To give something to someone for a short period of time, expecting it back.
words.exampleSentence: She agreed to lend me her laptop for the weekend project.
words.laoTranslation: ໃຫ້ຢືມ (hai yuem)
words.thaiTranslation: ให้ยืม (hai-yuem)

words.definition: A person living near or next door to you.
words.exampleSentence: My neighbor is very kind and always helps water my plants.
words.laoTranslation: ເພື່ອນບ້ານ (pheuan ban)
words.thaiTranslation: เพื่อนบ้าน (pheuan-ban)

words.definition: A thought or belief about something or someone.
words.exampleSentence: In my opinion, learning English online is highly effective.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຄິດເຫັນ (khuam khit hen)
words.thaiTranslation: ความคิดเห็น (khwam khit-hen)

words.definition: To keep someone or something safe from injury, damage, or loss.
words.exampleSentence: We need to protect national forests from illegal logging.
words.laoTranslation: ປົກປັກຮັກສາ / ປ້ອງກັນ (pok pak hak sa)
words.thaiTranslation: ปกป้อง / ป้องกัน (pok-pong)

words.definition: Making little or no noise.
words.exampleSentence: The library is a quiet place to study.
words.laoTranslation: ງຽບ (ngiep)
words.thaiTranslation: เงียบ (ngiep)

words.definition: To make smaller or less in amount, degree, or size.
words.exampleSentence: Biochar can help reduce greenhouse gas emissions.
words.laoTranslation: ຫຼຸດຜ່ອນ
words.thaiTranslation: ลดลง / ทำให้น้อยลง (lot long)

words.definition: To give a part of something to others.
words.exampleSentence: Please share your data with the rest of the research team.
words.laoTranslation: ແບ່ງປັນ (baeng pan)
words.thaiTranslation: แบ่งปัน (baeng-pan)

words.definition: Vehicles moving on public roads or public transport highways.
words.exampleSentence: The heavy morning traffic delayed his arrival at the university.
words.laoTranslation: ການຈະລາຈອນ
words.thaiTranslation: การจราจร

words.definition: To publicly recommend or support a particular cause or policy.
words.exampleSentence: Scientists advocate for sustainable agroforestry models.
words.laoTranslation: ສະໜັບສະໜູນ / ສະເໜີ
words.thaiTranslation: สนับสนุน / วิงวอน

words.definition: Instruct someone thoroughly, or provide a short concise overview of technical data structures.
words.exampleSentence: The research coordinator will brief the regional experts regarding the new raster processing tools.
words.laoTranslation: ລາຍງານຫຍໍ້ / ແນະນຳວຽກຫຍໍ້
words.thaiTranslation: สรุปงานให้ฟัง / บรีฟงาน

words.definition: To give something, especially money or support, to help achieve something.
words.exampleSentence: We want everyone to contribute ideas to the new community program.
words.laoTranslation: ປະກອບສ່ວນ (pa-kop suan)
words.thaiTranslation: มีส่วนร่วม / สมทบ / ช่วยเหลือ (mi suan-ruam)

words.definition: Showing a great deal of variety; very different.
words.exampleSentence: The ecosystem has a highly diverse range of native species.
words.laoTranslation: ຫຼາກຫຼາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: หลากหลาย / แตกต่างกัน (lak lay)

words.definition: To judge or calculate the quality, importance, amount, or value of something.
words.exampleSentence: The expert will evaluate the soil quality for coffee planting.
words.laoTranslation: ປະເມີນຜົນ (pa-moen phon)
words.thaiTranslation: ประเมินผล (pra-moen-phon)

words.definition: Possible to do easily or conveniently within the scope of current cooperative assets.
words.exampleSentence: The technician determined that installing an AppSheet-driven native species app was highly feasible.
words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ເປັນໄປໄດ້ / ທີ່ສາມາດບັນລຸໄດ້
words.thaiTranslation: ที่มีความเป็นไปได้ / สามารถปฏิบัติได้จริง

words.definition: Real and exactly what it appears or claims to be.
words.exampleSentence: The artifact turned out to be a genuine antique from the 16th century.
words.laoTranslation: ແທ້ຈິງ / ບໍລິສຸດ (thae ching)
words.thaiTranslation: แท้จริง / ของแท้ (thae-ching)

words.definition: To start using a plan, system, or law.
words.exampleSentence: The team needs to implement the new data collection protocol immediately.
words.laoTranslation: ຈັດຕັ້ງປະຕິບັດ / ນຳໃຊ້ (chat tang pa-ti-bat)
words.thaiTranslation: นำไปปฏิบัติ / เริ่มดำเนินการ (nam pai pra-ti-bat)

words.definition: Cause or enable a condition or state of affairs to continue.
words.exampleSentence: It is important to maintain a healthy weight.
words.laoTranslation: ຮັກສາ (hak sa)
words.thaiTranslation: รักษา/คงไว้ (rak sa)

words.definition: Something that blocks you so that movement, direction, or progress is difficult.
words.exampleSentence: Language barriers can be a minor obstacle during international projects.
words.laoTranslation: ອຸປະສັກ (u-pa-sak)
words.thaiTranslation: อุปสรรค (u-pra-sak)

words.definition: Enough to meet the needs of a situation or a person.
words.exampleSentence: Make sure there is sufficient water for the seedlings.
words.laoTranslation: ພຽງພໍ
words.thaiTranslation: เพียงพอ (phiang pho)

words.definition: A person, thing, or custom that seems to belong to a different time period than the present.
words.exampleSentence: Using paper maps instead of GPS trackers feels like an anachronism today.
words.laoTranslation: ສິ່ງທີ່ຜິດຕໍ່ຍຸກສະໄໝ (sing thi phid tor yuk sa-mai)
words.thaiTranslation: การผิดยุคผิดสมัย / สิ่งที่ล้าสมัยไม่เข้ากับยุคปัจจุบัน (kan phit-yuk)

words.definition: Lasting for only a very short time.
words.exampleSentence: Fame in the age of social media is often ephemeral.
words.laoTranslation: ບໍ່ຍືນຍົງ / ຄົງຢູ່ຊົ່ວຄາວ (bor yeun yong)
words.thaiTranslation: ไม่จีรัง / คงอยู่เพียงชั่วครู่ (mai chi-rang)

words.definition: Seeming to be everywhere at the same time.
words.exampleSentence: Smartphones have become completely ubiquitous in modern daily life.
words.laoTranslation: ມີຢູ່ທຸກຫົນທຸກແຫ່ງ (mi yu thuk hon thuk haeng)
words.thaiTranslation: แพร่หลาย / มีอยู่ทุกหนทุกแห่ง (phrae-lai)

words.definition: To choose between different options after thinking.
words.exampleSentence: You need to make a decision about your future career path.
words.laoTranslation: ຕັດສິນໃຈ (tat sin chai)
words.thaiTranslation: ตัดสินใจ (tat-sin-chai)

words.definition: To stop an activity for a short time to rest.
words.exampleSentence: Let's take a break for ten minutes and get some fresh water.
words.laoTranslation: ພັກຜ່ອນ (phak phon)
words.thaiTranslation: พักผ่อน / พักสายตา (phak-phon)

words.definition: To study a subject in detail to discover new facts.
words.exampleSentence: Scientists do research to develop cleaner farming techniques.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດການວິໄຈ (het kan wi-chai)
words.thaiTranslation: ทำการวิจัย (tham kan-wi-chai)

words.definition: To become infected with a cold virus.
words.exampleSentence: Wear a coat so you don't catch a cold.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນຫວັດ (pen vat)
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นหวัด (pen wat)

words.definition: To watch, listen to, or think about something carefully.
words.exampleSentence: Please pay attention to the safety instructions at the start.
words.laoTranslation: ເອົາໃຈໃສ່ / ຕັ້ງໃຈ (ao chai sai)
words.thaiTranslation: ตั้งใจฟัง / ใส่ใจ (tang-chai fang)

words.definition: To do what you said you would definitely do.
words.exampleSentence: He is an honest manager; he always keeps a promise.
words.laoTranslation: ຮັກສາສັນຍາ (hak sa san-nya)
words.thaiTranslation: รักษาสัญญา (rak-sa san-ya)

words.definition: To use less time than usual to complete something.
words.exampleSentence: Taking the highway will save time on our morning trip.
words.laoTranslation: ປະຢັດເວລາ (pa-yad we-la)
words.thaiTranslation: ประหยัดเวลา (pra-yat we-la)

words.definition: To start feeling strong displeasure or rage.
words.exampleSentence: There is no reason to get angry about minor mistakes.
words.laoTranslation: ສູນ / ຄຽດ (sun / khiat)
words.thaiTranslation: โกรธ / โมโห (krot / mo-ho)

words.definition: To talk with someone about various topics.
words.exampleSentence: We had a long conversation about the field study outcomes.
words.laoTranslation: ສົນທະນາ (son-tha-na)
words.thaiTranslation: สนทนา / พูดคุยกัน (son-tha-na)

words.definition: To deliver structured spoken information visually to an audience.
words.exampleSentence: The junior advisor will give a presentation on sustainable agroforestry.
words.laoTranslation: ນຳສະເໜີ (nam-sa-nae)
words.thaiTranslation: นำเสนองาน / บรรยาย (nam-sae-noe)

words.definition: To request assistance from someone else.
words.exampleSentence: Do not hesitate to ask for help if the app interface crashes.
words.laoTranslation: ຂໍຄວາມຊ່ວຍເຫຼືອ
words.thaiTranslation: ขอความช่วยเหลือ

words.definition: Extremely sad or upset because something didn't happen.
words.exampleSentence: The team was bitterly disappointed when the project got delayed.
words.laoTranslation: ຜິດຫວັງຢ່າງຮຸນແຮງ (phid wang yang hun haeng)
words.thaiTranslation: ผิดหวังอย่างรุนแรง / เสียใจอย่างมาก (phit-wang yang run-raeng)

words.definition: To meet or deal with a difficult situation with courage.
words.exampleSentence: Small scale farmers face a major challenge from extreme weather changes.
words.laoTranslation: ຜະເຊີນໜ້າກັບຄວາມທ້າທາຍ (pha xoen na kab khuam tha thai)
words.thaiTranslation: เผชิญหน้ากับความท้าทาย (pha-choen-na kap khwam tha-thai)

words.definition: Extremely crucial or important; or containing severe logical critique.
words.exampleSentence: Establishing accurate baseline coordinates is highly critical for target metrics.
words.laoTranslation: ສຳຄັນຢ່າງຍິ່ງ
words.thaiTranslation: สำคัญอย่างยิ่ง / วิกฤตอย่างยิ่ง (sam-khan-yang-ying)

words.definition: To finish a task by the required time.
words.exampleSentence: We worked late to meet the deadline.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດທັນກຳນົດເວລາ (het than)
words.thaiTranslation: ทำงานทันกำหนด (tham ngan than kam not)

words.definition: To obtain a deeper, accurate understanding of something complex.
words.exampleSentence: The forest monitoring maps help us gain insight into canopy loss.
words.laoTranslation: ໄດ້ຮັບຄວາມຮູ້ເລິກເຊິ່ງ (dai hab khuam hu lek seng)
words.thaiTranslation: ได้รับความรู้ลึกซึ้ง / เข้าใจอย่างทะลุปรุโปร่ง (dai-rap khwam-ru)

words.definition: To show to be completely true by using clear facts or evidence.
words.exampleSentence: The laboratory tests conclusively prove the water contains biochar residue.
words.laoTranslation: ພິສູດໄດ້ຢ່າງຊັດເຈນ (phi-sut dai yang xad chen)
words.thaiTranslation: พิสูจน์ได้อย่างชัดเจนปราศจากข้อสงสัย (phi-sut-dai)

words.definition: Of a much higher quality, capability, or performance than alternatives.
words.exampleSentence: The new software engine is vastly superior at processing topographical raster grids.
words.laoTranslation: ເໜືອກວ່າຫຼາຍ / ດີກວ່າຫຼາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: เหนือกว่าอย่างเห็นได้ชัด / ดีกว่ามาก

words.definition: Completely joined or bound together that they cannot be separated.
words.exampleSentence: Forest landscape health and rural farmer income are inextricably linked.
words.laoTranslation: ຜູກພັນກັນຢ່າງແຍກບໍ່ອອກ (phuk phan kan yang yaek bor ok)
words.thaiTranslation: ผูกพันกันอย่างแนบแน่นจนแยกไม่ออก (phuk-phan-kan)

words.definition: Formal, traditional, and impressive ceremony or public display.
words.exampleSentence: The diplomatic summit opened with immense pomp and circumstance.
words.laoTranslation: ພິທີການທີ່ສະຫງ່າງາມ / ຍິ່ງໃຫຍ່ (phi-thi-kan thi sa-nga ngam)

words.thaiTranslation: ตรวจสอบ / ตรวจตราหาข้อเท็จจริง (truat-sop)

words.definition: To think that something is true, correct, or real.

words.thaiTranslation: เชื่อ (chuea)

words.thaiTranslation: ศตวรรษ (รอบ 100 ปี) (sa ta wat)

words.definition: A person who buys goods or services from a shop or business.

words.definition: The study of past events, particularly in human affairs.

words.thaiTranslation: ประวัติศาสตร์ (pra-wat-ti-sat)

words.definition: Able to learn and understand things quickly and easily.

words.thaiTranslation: ฉลาด / มีไหวพริบ (cha-lat)

words.definition: A substance used to treat an illness or disease.

words.thaiTranslation: ยา / ยารักษาโรค (ya / ya-rak-sa-rok)

words.definition: Able to accept or tolerate delays, problems, or suffering without becoming annoyed.

words.thaiTranslation: อดทน

words.thaiTranslation: เหตุผล (het-phon)

words.thaiTranslation: วิทยาศาสตร์ (wit-tha-ya-sat)

words.definition: To intensify, increase, or further improve the quality, value, or extent of.

words.thaiTranslation: วัตถุประสงค์ / เป้าหมาย / เป็นกลาง (wat-thu-pra-song)

words.definition: Having knowledge or being aware of.

words.definition: Intricate, highly complicated, and confusing like a maze.

words.thaiTranslation: ประหยัดพลังงาน (pra-yat-pha-lang-ngan)

words.definition: To begin feeling exhausted or lacking physical strength.

words.thaiTranslation: เหนื่อย / เริ่มล้า (nueai)

words.definition: To redirect your sight or attention to inspect something.

words.definition: Extremely dedicated and loyal to a cause, job, or system.

words.definition: To take methodically planned preventative measures to reduce the impact of negative outcomes or shocks.

words.definition: An extremely clear, unusual, or noticeable case that proves a point.

words.thaiTranslation: วางแผนการ / กำหนดแผนงาน (wang-phaen-kan)

words.definition: Absolutely essential or crucial for the success of something.

words.thaiTranslation: สำคัญอย่างยิ่งยวด (sam-khan-yang-ying)

words.definition: To increase people's knowledge and understanding of an issue.

words.definition: A belief or premise accepted as true without any factual proof.

words.thaiTranslation: ข้อสันนิษฐานที่ไร้หลักฐานรองรับ (kho-san-nit-than)

words.definition: To direct your eyes towards someone or something to view them.

words.laoTranslation: ເບິ່ງ / ແນມເບິ່ງ (beung)
words.thaiTranslation: มองดู / พิจารณาดู (mong-du)

words.definition: To remove a piece of clothing; or when an aircraft leaves the ground.
words.exampleSentence: Please take off your shoes before entering the temple hall.
words.laoTranslation: ຖອດອອກ / ເຮືອບິນຂຶ້ນ (thot ok)
words.thaiTranslation: ถอดออก / (เครื่องบิน) บินขึ้น (thot-ok)

words.definition: To place garment items, clothing, or protective gear onto the body.
words.exampleSentence: Please put on your safety vest before entering the timber facility.
words.laoTranslation: ນຸ່ງ / ໃສ່
words.thaiTranslation: สวมใส่

words.definition: To enter a small vehicle like a car or taxi.

words.laoTranslation: ຂຶ້ນລົດ / ເຂົ້າມາ (khuen lot)
words.thaiTranslation: ขึ้นรถ (รถยนต์หรือแท็กซี่) (khuen-rot)

words.definition: To leave a room, building, or small vehicle.
words.exampleSentence: Please open the door and help get the data boxes out.

words.thaiTranslation: ออกไปข้างนอก / ลงรถ (ok-pai)

words.definition: To perform, execute, or complete a specific task or assignment.
words.exampleSentence: The researchers will carry out field measurements tomorrow morning.

words.thaiTranslation: ดำเนินงาน / ปฏิบัติภารกิจให้สำเร็จ (dam-noen-ngan)

words.definition: To stop trying to do something before you have finished.
words.exampleSentence: Don't give up on learning difficult terms; it takes time.
words.laoTranslation: ຍອມແພ້ / ເເຊົາ
words.thaiTranslation: ยอมแพ้ / เลิกทำ (yom phae / loek tham)

words.definition: To introduce a specific topic into a conversation or discussion.

words.thaiTranslation: หยิบยกประเด็นขึ้นมาพูดคุย (yip-yok-pra-den)

words.definition: To discover a fact or piece of information.
words.exampleSentence: We need to find out the market price of black garlic.
words.laoTranslation: ຊອກຮູ້ / ຄົ້ນພົບ

words.definition: To depend completely on a specific action, decision, or circumstance.

words.definition: A thing that a person or group does or has done.

words.definition: Relating or restricted to a particular nearby area or town.

words.definition: To become aware of something by seeing or hearing it.

words.definition: Something that is made to be sold, especially something produced by an industry.

words.definition: A particular administrative area or part of a country.

words.definition: The place, person, or thing from which something originates.

words.definition: A set of computer parts or things working together as a network.

words.definition: A person or thing that reduces a shock or unpredicted impact.

words.definition: The process of something becoming worse in quality or condition over time.

words.definition: To form an idea of the amount, number, or value of; assess.

words.laoTranslation: ປະເມີນຜົນ

words.definition: To create or prepare methodically a strategy, plan, or concept.

words.definition: To put a decision, plan, or agreement into effect.

words.definition: A trend or sign that shows the condition or existence of something.

words.definition: Make as large or great as possible, such as agricultural yield values or online stock dividends.

words.definition: A part, share, or number considered in comparative relation to a whole.

words.exampleSentence: Organic composting is a sustainable technique for high-value home gardens.

words.definition: To offer suggestions about the best course of action.

words.definition: To maintain communications with someone over time.

words.definition: To do something faster or more efficiently.

words.thaiTranslation: ได้รับข้อเสนอแนะ / คำติชม (dai-rap-kho-sae-nae)

words.definition: The occurrence of events by chance in a happy or beneficial way

words.definition: Lasting for only a very short time.

words.thaiTranslation: กำกวม / ไม่ชัดเจน (kam-kuam / mai chat-chen)

words.laoTranslation: ຂະຫຍັນ (kha-nyan)
words.thaiTranslation: ขยัน (kha-yan)

words.definition: The quality of being thankful; readiness to show appreciation

words.thaiTranslation: ความคิดถึง

words.thaiTranslation: พิถีพิถัน / ละเอียดลออ (phi-thi-phi-than / la-iat la-or)

words.definition: The science or practice of farming, including cultivation of the soil.

words.laoTranslation: ກະສິກຳ

words.definition: To send goods or services to another country for sale.
words.exampleSentence: Local smallholders aim to export premium black garlic to wellness markets.
words.laoTranslation: ສົ່ງອອກ

words.definition: A person holding a position of authority or command in an organization or government department.

words.definition: A business or agricultural entity owned and run jointly by its active members.

words.laoTranslation: ສະຫະກອນ
words.thaiTranslation: สหกรณ์

words.definition: Principles or standards by which something may be judged or decided.
words.exampleSentence: The investment team uses strict financial criteria to evaluate new green projects.

words.definition: To recognize or show the precise points that make things different.
words.exampleSentence: Eco-friendly certification helps differentiate our local spices from factory goods.
words.laoTranslation: ຈໍາແນກ / ເຮັດໃຫ້ແຕກຕ່າງ
words.thaiTranslation: แยกแยะ / ทำให้แตกต่าง

words.definition: To intentionally become involved in a difficult meeting debate to clear up confusion.

words.laoTranslation: ແຊກແຊງ / ເຂົ້າໄກ່ເກ່ຍ

words.definition: Of vital importance; crucial or mandatory.
words.exampleSentence: It is imperative to lower chemical usage to achieve standard certificate approvals.

words.definition: The amount of money expected, required, or given in payment for a commodity or service.
words.exampleSentence: The wholesale price of organic garlic rose due to strong demand in international hubs.
words.laoTranslation: ລາຄາ
words.thaiTranslation: ราคา / มูลค่าสิ่งของ

words.definition: An area or patch of territory having a particular characteristic or specific usage rules.
words.exampleSentence: The land was officially designated as a protected biosphere zone for research.
words.laoTranslation: ເຂດ / ເຂດແດນ
words.thaiTranslation: เขต / พื้นที่เฉพาะ

words.definition: To make technical workflows, standard operating procedures, or formats uniform.
words.exampleSentence: We must standardize our email communication templates for all international donors.

words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้เป็นมาตรฐาน / ปรับปรุงให้เหมือนกัน

words.definition: The cultivation of a single crop on a piece of farmland to the exclusion of other species.

words.definition: The ability to produce a desired or intended result.

words.definition: Containing nothing; not filled or occupied.
words.exampleSentence: The glass was empty so he poured some fresh water.
words.laoTranslation: ວ່າງເປົ່າ
words.thaiTranslation: ว่างเปล่า

words.definition: To fail to properly appreciate something due to over-familiarity.
words.exampleSentence: We should not take for granted the ecosystem services provided by local rivers.
words.laoTranslation: ເບິ່ງຂ້າມຄວາມສໍາຄັນ
words.thaiTranslation: มองข้ามความสำคัญ / ทึกทักไปเอง

words.definition: A sequence of reciprocal cause and effect in which two elements worsen each other.
words.exampleSentence: Low soil nutrients lead to weak yields, creating a vicious cycle of poverty.
words.laoTranslation: ວົງຈອນອຸບາດ
words.thaiTranslation: วงจรอุบาทว์

words.definition: The varied benefits that humans freely gain from the natural environment.
words.exampleSentence: Forest conservation provides vital ecosystem services like water filtration.
words.laoTranslation: ການບໍລິການທາງລະົບນິເວດ
words.thaiTranslation: การบริการทางระบบนิเวศ

words.definition: The global or cross-border buyer zones where domestic agricultural products are sold.
words.exampleSentence: High-quality phytosanitary standards are required to unlock access to the premium export market.
words.laoTranslation: ຕະຫຼາດສົ່ງອອກ
words.thaiTranslation: ตลาดส่งออก

words.definition: A biological plant or animal species that occurs naturally in an ecosystem without human introduction.
words.exampleSentence: Our data collection application is optimized to catalogue native species seedlings in the buffer zone.
words.laoTranslation: ພັນພືດພື້ນເມືອງ / ຊະນິດພັນພື້ນເມືອງ
words.thaiTranslation: ชนิดพันธุ์พืชพื้นเมือง / สิ่งมีชีวิตประจำถิ่น

words.definition: The fundamental or primary origin of a problem, defect, or failure.
words.exampleSentence: A thorough Problem Tree Analysis allows planners to locate the root cause of low yields.
words.laoTranslation: ສາເຫດຕົ້ນຕໍ / ຮາກເຫງົ້າຂອງບັນຫາ
words.thaiTranslation: สาเหตุที่แท้จริง / ต้นตอของปัญหา

words.definition: A detailed examination of the elements or structure of something.
words.exampleSentence: We completed a Problem Tree Analysis to track crop disease root causes.
words.laoTranslation: ການວິເຄາະ
words.thaiTranslation: การวิเคราะห์

words.definition: The basic physical and organizational structures (roads, rails, power) needed for society.
words.exampleSentence: The new railway line significantly upgraded the regional trade infrastructure.
words.laoTranslation: ໂຄງລ່າງພື້ນຖານ
words.thaiTranslation: โครงสร้างพื้นฐาน

words.definition: Income, especially when of a company or organization of a substantial scale.
words.exampleSentence: Exporting black garlic concentrates generates higher revenue than selling raw bulbs.
words.laoTranslation: ລາຍຮັບ / ລາຍໄດ້
words.thaiTranslation: รายได้ / ผลตอบแทน

words.definition: A tax or official customs duty to be paid on a specific class of imports or exports.
words.exampleSentence: The trade agreement reduced the entry tariff on organic tea products significantly.
words.laoTranslation: ອັດຕາພາສີ / ເກັບພາສີ
words.thaiTranslation: พิกัดอัตราภาษีศุลกากร / ค่าธรรมเนียม

words.definition: The complex micro-management of the flow, storage, and transport of commercial cargo.
words.exampleSentence: Efficient logistics are required to move fresh black garlic to international markets.
words.laoTranslation: ໂລຈິສຕິກ / ການຄຸ້ມຄອງການຂົນສົ່ງ
words.thaiTranslation: โลจิสติกส์ / การบริหารจัดการระบบขนส่ง

words.definition: The total net amount of money being transferred into and out of an enterprise or farm account.
words.exampleSentence: Securing advance pre-finance agreements maintains healthy cash flow during long cultivation cycles.
words.laoTranslation: ກະແສເງິນສົດ
words.thaiTranslation: กระแสเงินสด / การหมุนเวียนเงินสด

words.definition: The exchange of goods, assets, or services between two adjacent countries.
words.exampleSentence: The regional railway network serves as a major artery for cross-border trade.
words.laoTranslation: ການຄ້າຊາຍແດນ / ການຄ້າຂ້າມແດນ
words.thaiTranslation: การค้าชายแดน / การค้าข้ามพรมแดน

words.definition: Not harmful to the environment, ecosystems, or local biological networks during agricultural production.
words.exampleSentence: Biochar offers an eco-friendly soil amendment that increases organic carbon retention values.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນມິດຕໍ່ສິ່ງແວດລ້ອມ
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นมิตรต่อสิ่งแวดล้อม / รักษ์โลก

words.definition: A concise structured description of an operational issue to be analyzed.
words.exampleSentence: The first step in our problem tree analysis was drafting a precise problem statement.
words.laoTranslation: ການກໍານົດບັນຫາ / ຄໍາຖະແຫຼງບັນຫາ
words.thaiTranslation: การตั้งประเด็นปัญหา / คำแถลงปัญหา

words.definition: The basic unprocessed or primary organic material from which value-added goods are produced.
words.exampleSentence: Fresh organic garlic serves as the essential raw material for creating black garlic batches.
words.laoTranslation: ວັດຖຸດິບ
words.thaiTranslation: วัตถุดิบ / สรรพสิ่งขั้นต้นที่ยังไม่แปรรูป

words.definition: Essential chemical minerals stored in earth layers required for high plant health.
words.exampleSentence: Applying premium biochar mixes securely locks vital soil nutrients against runoff.
words.laoTranslation: ທາດອາຫານໃນດິນ
words.thaiTranslation: สารอาหารในดิน

words.definition: The specific demographic group or consumer block at which a presentation, brand, or crop is aimed.
words.exampleSentence: High-end health stores in regional capitals serve as our primary target market.
words.laoTranslation: ຕະຫຼາດເປົ້າໝາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ตลาดเป้าหมาย

words.definition: To originate from, be caused by, or develop out of a specific root cause.
words.exampleSentence: Many logistics bottlenecks stem from redundant paperwork rules at custom checkposts.
words.laoTranslation: ເກີດມາຈາກ / ມີສາເຫດມາຈາກ
words.thaiTranslation: เกิดมาจาก / มีต้นตอมาจาก

words.definition: The immense variety of biological life, plant species, and wildlife present within a specific research ecosystem.
words.exampleSentence: Pristine forest conservation areas protect vital plant biodiversity needed for future medical wellness discoveries.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຫຼາກຫຼາຍທາງຊີວະນາໆພັນ
words.thaiTranslation: ความหลากหลายทางชีวภาพ

words.definition: To estimate or reckon a value, cost, or opportunity cost incorrectly during project planning.
words.exampleSentence: Agribusiness firms might fail if they miscalculate seasonal processing facility overheads.
words.laoTranslation: ຄິດໄລ່ຜິດພາດ
words.thaiTranslation: คำนวณผิดพลาด / ประเมินคลาดเคลื่อน

words.definition: The high upper layer formed by mature tree crowns in a forest ecosystem, blocking solar exposure.
words.exampleSentence: The thick jungle canopy maintains an ideal microclimate for sensitive undergrowth herbs.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮືອນຍອດ / ຈອມປ່າ
words.thaiTranslation: เรือนยอดไม้ / หลังคาป่า

words.definition: Financial assets or liquid wealth used to fund a business enterprise or setup.
words.exampleSentence: Upgrading to industrial steam distillation units requires substantial capital.
words.laoTranslation: ທຶນ / ເງິນທຶນ
words.thaiTranslation: ทุน / เงินทุน

words.definition: A biological community of interacting organisms and their physical structural environment.
words.exampleSentence: Sustainable forestry guarantees that the local ecosystem is protected against erosion.
words.laoTranslation: ລະບົບນິເວດ
words.thaiTranslation: ระบบนิเวศ

words.definition: A structured conceptual guide used to organize research steps or problem-solving.
words.exampleSentence: The expert used a rigorous analytical framework to map regional transit bottlenecks.
words.laoTranslation: ຂອບແນວຄິດການວິເຄາະ
words.thaiTranslation: กรอบการวิเคราะห์

words.definition: An assessment focusing on descriptive properties, processes, and interviews rather than figures.
words.exampleSentence: The advisor complemented the numerical graphs with a clear qualitative analysis.
words.laoTranslation: ການວິເຄາະດ້ານຄຸນນະພາບ
words.thaiTranslation: การวิเคราะห์เชิงคุณภาพ

words.definition: The physical state or chemical capacity of soil to supply vital plant nutrients in adequate amounts.
words.exampleSentence: Integrating compost and biochar compounds builds long-term soil fertility in home gardens.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມອຸດົມສົມບູນຂອງດິນ
words.thaiTranslation: ความอุดมสมบูรณ์ของดิน

words.definition: Targeted practical advice, specialized training, or support provided by experts.
words.exampleSentence: Advisors provide technical assistance to help small farms meet sanitary trade codes.
words.laoTranslation: ການຊ່ວຍເຫຼືອທາງດ້ານເຕັກນິກ
words.thaiTranslation: ความช่วยเหลือทางวิชาการ / ด้านเทคนิค

words.definition: To break down a complex technical problem statement or report into simpler components.
words.exampleSentence: The consultant used problem tree analysis to deconstruct systemic institutional barriers.
words.laoTranslation: ແຍກແຍະ / ວິເຄາະໂຄງສ້າງ
words.thaiTranslation: แยกแยะ / วิเคราะห์โครงสร้างย่อย

words.definition: Having the opposite of the desired effect; hindering instead of helping progress.
words.exampleSentence: Adding chemical fertilizers to a pure biochar experiment can be counterproductive.
words.laoTranslation: ຂັດຕໍ່ຜົນປະໂຫຍດ / ໃຫ້ຜົນກົງກັນຂ້າມ
words.thaiTranslation: ตรงกันข้ามกับที่คาดไว้ / ไม่เป็นผลดี

words.definition: The state of being exposed to risk, financial losses, or ecological damage.
words.exampleSentence: Smallholders face severe economic vulnerability due to shifting cross-border tariffs.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມອ່ອນໄຫວ / ຄວາມຊຸດໂຊມງ່າຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ความเปราะบาง / ความเสี่ยง

words.definition: The availability of liquid cash reserves to cover instant operational expenses.
words.exampleSentence: Agribusiness processing plants need steady liquidity to pay farmers on time.
words.laoTranslation: ສະພາບຄ່ອງທາງດ້ານການເງິນ
words.thaiTranslation: สภาพคล่องทางการเงิน

words.definition: The action of making an agricultural practice more extreme or maximizing field outputs.
words.exampleSentence: Sustainable intensification yields higher garlic outputs without clear-cutting native timber.
words.laoTranslation: ການເພີ່ມຄວາມເຂັ້ມຂຸ້ນ / ການຜະລິດແບບເລັ່ງລັດ
words.thaiTranslation: การเพิ่มความเข้มข้น / การเกษตรแบบเร่งรัด

words.definition: Wood prepared comprehensively for use in building structures, carpentry, or industrial manufacturing pathways.
words.exampleSentence: Sustainable forestry systems balance annual timber harvesting volumes with active native seedling replanting.
words.laoTranslation: ໄມ້ທ່ອນ / ໄມ້ປປຸກສ້າງ
words.thaiTranslation: ไม้ซุง / เนื้อไม้ที่ใช้ในการก่อสร้าง

words.definition: To predict future business trends, crop yields, or economic indicators in a summary briefing.
words.exampleSentence: The agribusiness team intends to forecast quarterly roselle export revenues.
words.laoTranslation: ຄາດຄະເນລ່ວງໜ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: คาดการณ์ล่วงหน้า / พยากรณ์

words.definition: To gradually wear away soil or geologic structures via weathering actions of running water or heavy wind patterns.
words.exampleSentence: Stripping vegetation cover causes topsoil layers to erode rapidly during the intense wet monsoon seasons.
words.laoTranslation: ເຊາະເຈື່ອນ / ເປື່ອຍຫ້ຽນ
words.thaiTranslation: กัดเซาะ / สึกกร่อนทำลาย

words.definition: The carrying or conveying of people, travelers, or cargo from one spot to another.
words.exampleSentence: The perishable organic vegetables were damaged while in transit over the pass.
words.laoTranslation: ການຜ່ານແດນ / ການຂົນສົ່ງຜ່ານ
words.thaiTranslation: การเดินทางผ่าน / การส่งผ่านทรานสิต

words.definition: An exhaustive structural assessment evaluating the practical, economic, and technical viability of a plan.
words.exampleSentence: We submitted a comprehensive feasibility study regarding the establishment of the agri-standard facility.
words.laoTranslation: ບົດວິພາກເສດຖະກິດ-ເຕັກນິກ / ບົດສຶກສາຄວາມເປັນໄປໄດ້
words.thaiTranslation: การศึกษาความเป็นไปได้ของโครงการอย่างละเอียด

words.definition: The process of long-term capture and storage of atmospheric carbon dioxide.
words.exampleSentence: Agroforestry practices dramatically accelerate baseline soil carbon sequestration.
words.laoTranslation: ການກັກເກັບຄາບອນ
words.thaiTranslation: การกักเก็บคาร์บอน

words.definition: The entire structural sequence of processes involved in moving a product to consumers.
words.exampleSentence: Any disruption in the supply chain delays the delivery of fresh agricultural raw inputs.
words.laoTranslation: ຫ່ວງໂສ້ອຸປະທານ / ສາຍໂສ້ການສະໜອງ
words.thaiTranslation: ห่วงโซ่อุปทาน / ระบบซัพพลายเชน

words.definition: The measurable alteration, damage, or benefit caused to an ecosystem by operational practices.
words.exampleSentence: Every major railway infrastructure expansion requires an advance environmental impact evaluation study.
words.laoTranslation: ຜົນກະທົບຕໍ່ສິ່ງແວດລ້ອມ
words.thaiTranslation: ผลกระทบต่อสิ่งแวดล้อม / ผลกระทบทางนิเวศวิทยา

words.definition: The regulated commercial exchange of goods executed between two specific nations.
words.exampleSentence: Customs updates have significantly streamlined bilateral trade flows this year.
words.laoTranslation: ການຄ້າທວິພາຄີ / ການຄ້າສອງຝ່າຍ
words.thaiTranslation: การค้าทวิภาคี

words.definition: A step-by-step framework compiled to help workers execute routine actions.
words.exampleSentence: Every worker must review the standard operating procedure for herbal oil extraction.
words.laoTranslation: ຂັ້ນຕອນການປະຕິບັດງານທີ່ເປັນມາດຕະຖານ
words.thaiTranslation: ขั้นตอนการปฏิบัติงานที่เป็นมาตรฐาน

words.definition: A structural policy or regulatory rule inside entities that limits development.
words.exampleSentence: Opaque certificate compliance rules form an institutional barrier for village co-ops.
words.laoTranslation: ອຸປະສັກທາງດ້ານສະຖາບັນ
words.thaiTranslation: อุปสรรคทางสถาบัน / ข้อจำกัดเชิงระบบ

words.definition: The complex interactive links between social behaviors and economic parameters.
words.exampleSentence: Specialized border zones alter the socio-economic dynamic of mountain districts.
words.laoTranslation: ພົນລະວັດທາງດ້ານເສດຖະກິດ-ສັງຄົມ
words.thaiTranslation: พลวัตทางเศรษฐกิจและสังคม

words.definition: To grow a crop among plants of a different kind, optimizing soil utilization and field space.
words.exampleSentence: Smallholders often intercrop fast-growing chilies alongside their young native tree seedlings.
words.laoTranslation: ປູກພືດສະຫຼັບ / ປູກພືດຮ່ວມ
words.thaiTranslation: ปลูกพืชแซม / ปลูกพืชร่วมกัน

words.definition: To heat a drying chamber or processing unit before introducing raw agricultural inputs.
words.exampleSentence: Always preheat the solar cabinet before loading fresh roselle blossoms.
words.laoTranslation: ຕົ້ມອົບລ່ວງໜ້າ / ເຮັດໃຫ້ຮ້ອນກ່ອນ
words.thaiTranslation: อุ่นเครื่องล่วงหน้า / ทำความร้อนก่อน

words.definition: The branch of economics concerned with large-scale regional trade indicators and policies.
words.exampleSentence: Changes in regional railway tariffs are deeply tied to macroeconomics.
words.laoTranslation: ເສດຖະສາດມະຫາພາກ
words.thaiTranslation: เศรษฐศาสตร์มหภาค

words.definition: The deliberate act of preparing land, planting crops, and caring for their physiological development.
words.exampleSentence: The systematic cultivation of medicinal herbs like Gynostemma requires balanced shade controls.
words.laoTranslation: ການປູກຝັງ / ການເພາະປູກ
words.thaiTranslation: การเพาะปลูก / การทำกสิกรรม

words.definition: To adapt traditional practices or processing facilities to contemporary technical standards.
words.exampleSentence: The cooperative built mobile tracking layouts to modernize their logistics chain.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ທັນສະໄໝ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้ทันสมัย / ปรับปรุงใหม่

words.definition: The foundational capability of maintaining ecological balance and natural resources without depletion over time.
words.exampleSentence: The certification facility provides strict standards to audit the sustainability of commercial timber farms.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຍືນຍົງ
words.thaiTranslation: ความยั่งยืน / การรักษาความสมดุลทางธรรมชาติ

words.definition: A person who concentrates primarily on a particular subject or highly technical field.
words.exampleSentence: The forestry specialist trained local extension workers on native species collection.
words.laoTranslation: ຜູ້ຊ່ຽວຊານສະເພາະດ້ານ
words.thaiTranslation: ผู้เชี่ยวชาญเฉพาะทาง

words.definition: Performed according to a systematic, highly organized, and logical process.
words.exampleSentence: A methodical investigation using problem trees isolates the true origin of crop loss.
words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ມີລະບົບລະບຽບ / ເຮັດຕາມຂັ້ນຕອນ
words.thaiTranslation: อย่างเป็นระบบ / มีระเบียบแบบแผน

words.definition: To take the chance to gain advantage from a specific economic resource or trend.
words.exampleSentence: Agrarian cooperatives want to capitalize on fast transit links to target markets.
words.laoTranslation: ສວຍໂອກາດສ້າງຜົນປະໂຫຍດ / ຫັນເປັນທຶນ
words.thaiTranslation: ใช้ประโยชน์เพื่อสร้างกำไร / เปลี่ยนเป็นทุน

words.definition: The overall rate and volume of agricultural or industrial output per unit of input resource used.
words.exampleSentence: Drip irrigation infrastructure upgrades elevated the annual productivity of the garlic plots.
words.laoTranslation: ປະສິດທິພາບການຜະລິດ / ສະມັດຖະພາບ
words.thaiTranslation: ผลิตภาพ / ความสามารถในการผลิตผลผลิต

words.definition: A prolonged period of abnormally low precipitation, resulting in water shortages.
words.exampleSentence: Adding organic matter helps retain vital moisture during a severe seasonal drought.
words.laoTranslation: ໄພແຫ້ງແລ້ງ
words.thaiTranslation: ภัยแล้ง

words.definition: A substance obtained or distilled from a plant or herb via technical processes.
words.exampleSentence: Medicinal extract from local roots is highly valued for high-end wellness oils.
words.laoTranslation: ສານສະກັດ
words.thaiTranslation: สารสกัด

words.definition: An official systematic inspection of an organization's financial accounts or operating standard logs.
words.exampleSentence: The center completed an independent compliance audit to renew its organic trade credentials.
words.laoTranslation: ການກວດສອບ / ການກວດສອບບັນຊີ
words.thaiTranslation: การตรวจสอบอย่างละเอียด / การตรวจประเมินภายใน

words.definition: A commercial enterprise or business undertaking involving a degree of financial risk.
words.exampleSentence: The family pooled their savings to start a roselle tea processing venture.
words.laoTranslation: ການຮ່ວມທຶນ / ທຸລະກິດສ່ຽງ
words.thaiTranslation: การร่วมทุน / การเสี่ยงลงทุน

words.definition: To happen, occur, or be systematically conducted at a specific venue.
words.exampleSentence: The regional agricultural expo will take place near the railway station terminal.
words.laoTranslation: ຈັດຂຶ້ນ / ເກີດຂຶ້ນ
words.thaiTranslation: เกิดขึ้น / จัดขึ้น ณ

words.definition: To maintain a continuous, accurate record of changing operational data or metrics.
words.exampleSentence: Supervisors use an AppSheet tool to keep track of daily processing yields.
words.laoTranslation: ຕິດຕາມ / ບັນທຶກ
words.thaiTranslation: ติดตามความคืบหน้า / บันทึกข้อมูล

words.definition: A rail transportation link crossing international borders to facilitate fast logistics.
words.exampleSentence: The cross-border railway has minimized transit friction for global spice shipments.
words.laoTranslation: ທາງລົດໄຟຂ້າມແດນ
words.thaiTranslation: ทางรถไฟข้ามพรมแดน

words.definition: The structural process of recovering a severely degraded or deforested habitat.
words.exampleSentence: Planting diverse native timber species drives real, localized ecosystem restoration.
words.laoTranslation: ການຟື້ນຟູລະບົບນିເວດ
words.thaiTranslation: การฟื้นฟูระบบนิเวศ

words.definition: The production of premium agricultural commodities yielding high returns per area unit.
words.exampleSentence: The state promotes high-value agriculture like organic medicinal teas for export profit.
words.laoTranslation: ກະສິກຳທີ່ມີມູນຄ່າສູງ
words.thaiTranslation: เกษตรกรรมมูลค่าสูง

words.definition: A systematic fiscal analysis of an enterprise's balance sheets and capital costs.
words.exampleSentence: A rigorous financial evaluation is vital before obtaining international credit lines.
words.laoTranslation: ການປະເມິ່ນຜົນທາງດ້ານການເງິນ
words.thaiTranslation: การประเมินผลทางการเงิน

words.definition: A concentrated aromatic liquid compound carefully distilled from targeted plant parts.
words.exampleSentence: The lab processes wild medicinal leaves into pure therapeutic essential oil formulas.
words.laoTranslation: ນ້ຳມັນຫອມລະເຫີຍ
words.thaiTranslation: น้ำมันหอมระเหย

words.definition: Capable of being decomposed naturally by biological bacteria or living organisms.
words.exampleSentence: The center recommends packing organic garlic in biodegradable mesh bags.
words.laoTranslation: ສາມາດຍ່ອຍສະຫຼາຍໄດ້ຕາມທຳມະຊາດ
words.thaiTranslation: สามารถย่อยสลายได้ตามธรรมชาติ

words.definition: To produce or cultivate a higher volume of commodities than the target market demands.
words.exampleSentence: Cooperatives must ensure they do not overproduce raw chili and crash local prices.
words.laoTranslation: ຜະລິດເກີນຄວາມຕ້ອງການ
words.thaiTranslation: ผลิตเกินความต้องการ / ผลิตล้นตลาด

words.definition: Having parts or trade dynamics that fail to correspond in scale, power, or arrangement.
words.exampleSentence: Smallholders often operate within an asymmetrical relationship with cross-border middlemen.
words.laoTranslation: ບໍ່ສົມດຸນ / ບໍ່ສະເໝີພາບ
words.thaiTranslation: ไม่สมดุลกัน / ไม่เท่าเทียมกัน

words.definition: An agricultural watering methodology that feeds moisture underneath the soil surface.
words.exampleSentence: Implementing subirrigation inside the garden conserves water during dry spells.
words.laoTranslation: ການຊົນລະປະທານໃຕ້ດິນ
words.thaiTranslation: การชลประทานใต้ผิวดิน

words.definition: An estimation of the worth or commercial value of a property, asset, or harvest.
words.exampleSentence: An accurate carbon credit valuation rewards communities for forest preservation.
words.laoTranslation: ການປະເມີນມູນຄ່າ
words.thaiTranslation: การประเมินมูลค่า

words.definition: The technical process of making operational methods or product qualities conform to a strict unified scale.
words.exampleSentence: Agri-product standardization ensures local crops meet export quality checks for international transport corridors.
words.laoTranslation: ການເຮັດໃຫ້ເປັນມາດຕະຖານ
words.thaiTranslation: การทำให้เป็นมาตรฐาน / การจัดระเบียบเกณฑ์มาตรฐาน

words.definition: Relating to or concerned with the interactive mix of social and economic realities.
words.exampleSentence: Modern transit networks profoundly change the socioeconomic dynamic of rural border towns.
words.laoTranslation: ທາງດ້ານເສດຖະກິດ-ສັງຄົມ
words.thaiTranslation: ทางเศรษฐกิจและสังคม

words.definition: Standardized methods used to calculate carbon units sequestered or emitted by a system.
words.exampleSentence: The team uses satellite data to execute carbon accounting across forest concessions.
words.laoTranslation: ການບັນຊີຄາບອນ
words.thaiTranslation: การบัญชีคาร์บอน

words.definition: The state of conforming to official government laws and industry safety codes.
words.exampleSentence: Our laboratory helps small agri-processing startups achieve regulatory compliance.
words.laoTranslation: ການປະຕິບັດຕາມກົດລະບຽບ
words.thaiTranslation: การปฏิบัติตามกฎระเบียบ

words.definition: To unwind and relax after a highly intense conference presentation or technical workshop.
words.exampleSentence: The leadership team took thirty minutes to decompress before starting the review.
words.laoTranslation: ຜ່ອນຄາຍຄວາມຕຶງຄຽດ
words.thaiTranslation: ผ่อนคลายความเครียด / ลดความกดดัน

words.definition: To hold or express a different opinion during team consensus building.
words.exampleSentence: It is natural for cross-functional partners to disagree on financial priorities.
words.laoTranslation: ບໍ່ເຫັນດີ / ຂັດແຍ່ງ
words.thaiTranslation: ไม่เห็นด้วย / ขัดแย้ง

words.definition: The structural degree to which a business transaction or enterprise yields financial gain after costs.
words.exampleSentence: Value-addition models drastically upgrade the long-term profitability of family garden plots.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມສາມາດໃນການສ້າງກຳໄລ
words.thaiTranslation: ความสามารถในการทำกำไร / ผลกำไรสะสม

words.definition: To describe a project constraint or problem statement as more important than it really is.
words.exampleSentence: It is unwise to overstate the expected crop yields before the final harvest audit.
words.laoTranslation: ເວົ້າເກີນຄວາມຈິງ
words.thaiTranslation: กล่าวเกินจริง / โอ้อวดเกินจริง

words.definition: To prepare or deliver a brief, condensed summary covering major project outcomes.
words.exampleSentence: The manager asked me to summarize the main action fields in a short memo.
words.laoTranslation: ສະຫຼຸບສັງລວມ
words.thaiTranslation: สรุปใจความสำคัญ / ย่อความ

words.definition: A structured list of targeted items or tracks to be resolved during an office session.
words.exampleSentence: Let us place the AppSheet technical layout at the top of our meeting agenda.
words.laoTranslation: ວາລະກອງປະຊຸມ
words.thaiTranslation: วาระการประชุม

words.definition: A selected team of agricultural or trade experts discussing themes before an audience.
words.exampleSentence: The afternoon panel will tackle institutional barriers in cross-border trade.
words.laoTranslation: ຄະນະຜູ້ອະພິປາຍ / ຈຸຊ່ຽວຊານ
words.thaiTranslation: คณะผู้ร่วมอภิปราย / คณะผู้เชี่ยวชาญ

words.definition: A constructive discussion aimed at finding alignment or resolving complex issues.
words.exampleSentence: The framework encourages open dialogue between forest groups and local ministries.
words.laoTranslation: ການສົນທະນາ / ບົດສົນທະນາ
words.thaiTranslation: การสนทนาแลกเปลี่ยนความคิดเห็น

words.definition: Useful evaluative critiques transmitted via email to help upgrade output quality.
words.exampleSentence: We welcome constructive feedback on the new standard validation protocol draft.
words.laoTranslation: ຄໍາຄິດເຫັນກັບຄືນ / ຂໍ້ມູນປ້ອນກັບ
words.thaiTranslation: ข้อมูลสะท้อนกลับ / ข้อเสนอแนะ

words.definition: Formal academic debate or serious communication within a scientific field.
words.exampleSentence: Her research added profound clarity to the discourse on regional microclimates.
words.laoTranslation: ວາທະກໍາ / ການສົນທະນາທາງວິຊາການ
words.thaiTranslation: วาทกรรม / การวิเคราะห์ถกเถียงเชิงวิชาการ

words.definition: To write or create a preliminary text layout of a technical brief or proposal.
words.exampleSentence: I will draft an email to request downloaded satellite imagery sets.
words.laoTranslation: ຮ່າງ (ເອກະສານ)
words.thaiTranslation: ร่างข้อความ / เขียนแบบฉบับร่าง

words.definition: A specific period of time set aside for a workshop track or keynote address.
words.exampleSentence: The breakout session on native species identification starts after lunch.
words.laoTranslation: ວາລະ / ພາກກອງປະຊຸມ
words.thaiTranslation: ช่วงเวลาการประชุม / เซสชัน

words.definition: To officially present structured findings and technical slides to a meeting group.
words.exampleSentence: The Assistant Professor will deliver a presentation on standard validation centers.
words.laoTranslation: ຂຶ້ນນໍາສະເໜີ / ບັນລະຍາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: นำเสนอผลงาน / บรรยายข้อมูล

words.definition: To act as the official moderator leading an office coordination or strategy call.
words.exampleSentence: She was asked to chair a meeting regarding cross-border railway transport tariffs.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນປະທານກອງປະຊຸມ
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นประธานในที่ประชุม

words.definition: To distribute the scheduled list of meeting topics to collaborators ahead of time.
words.exampleSentence: Please circulate the agenda via email so attendees can prepare constructive inputs.
words.laoTranslation: ແຈກຢາຍວາລະກອງປະຊຸມ
words.thaiTranslation: แจกจ่ายวาระการประชุม

words.definition: To look at and speak directly to a gathered room of conference participants.
words.exampleSentence: The keynote panelist paused for effect before starting to address the audience.
words.laoTranslation: ກ່າວປາໄສຕໍ່ຜູ້ຟັງ
words.thaiTranslation: กล่าวปราศรัยต่อผู้ฟัง

words.definition: To officially arrange and summon colleagues to attend an urgent project sync.
words.exampleSentence: The director decided to call a meeting to tackle the recent laboratory audit errors.
words.laoTranslation: ຮຽກໂຮມປະຊຸມ
words.thaiTranslation: เรียกประชุมทีม

words.definition: To offer helpful, structured critiques to upgrade a team member's report draft.
words.exampleSentence: A true team leader knows how to provide constructive feedback without causing offense.
words.laoTranslation: ໃຫ້ຄໍາຄິດເຫັນທີ່ສ້າງສັນ
words.thaiTranslation: ให้คำแนะนำเชิงสร้างสรรค์

words.definition: To compose the initial preliminary framework of a technical project brief or analysis.
words.exampleSentence: The advisor plans to draft a report tracking local soil nutrients and biochar layers.
words.laoTranslation: ຮ່າງບົດລາຍງານ
words.thaiTranslation: ร่างรายงานผลการศึกษา

words.definition: To bring diverse cross-departmental sectors to complete agreement on a choice.
words.exampleSentence: We need to debate the opportunity costs until we reach a consensus on the location.
words.laoTranslation: ບັນລຸຂໍ້ຕົກລົງເອກະພາບ
words.thaiTranslation: บรรลุมติเอกฉันท์ / หาข้อสรุปร่วมกัน

words.definition: To advance to the subsequent structural theme on an office schedule layout.
words.exampleSentence: If there are no objections, let us move to the next item on our brief.
words.laoTranslation: ຜ່ານໄປວາລະຕໍ່ໄປ
words.thaiTranslation: ไปสู่วาระการประชุมถัดไป

words.definition: To officially invite technical queries or comments from conference attendees.
words.exampleSentence: The moderator will now open the floor for direct interaction with the panel.
words.laoTranslation: ເປີດໂອກາດໃຫ້ຊັກຖາມ / ເປີດເວທີ
words.thaiTranslation: เปิดโอกาสให้ผู้ฟังซักถาม / เปิดฟลอร์

words.definition: To provide supplementary detail to ensure an email or report fact is clear.
words.exampleSentence: Allow me to clarify a point regarding the AppSheet native species application setup.
words.laoTranslation: ຊີ້ແຈງຂໍ້ຂ້ອງໃຈ
words.thaiTranslation: ชี้แจงประเด็นสำคัญให้กระจ่าง

words.definition: To write down the official real-time decisions and assigned tasks during a call.
words.exampleSentence: The project assistant will take the minutes during the interdepartmental session.
words.laoTranslation: ຈົດບັນທຶກການປະຊຸມ
words.thaiTranslation: จดบันทึกรายงานการประชุม

words.definition: To formally send a business plan or project layout to senior leadership for review.
words.exampleSentence: The cooperative is ready to submit a proposal for organic roselle tea manufacturing.
words.laoTranslation: ຍື່นຂໍ້ສະເໜີ / ຍື່ນໂຄງການ
words.thaiTranslation: ยื่นข้อเสนอโครงการ

words.definition: To transmit a progress email detailing recent workflow changes or task status.
words.exampleSentence: I will send an update as soon as the standard validation center files are signed.
words.laoTranslation: ສົ່ງຂໍ້ມູນອັບເດດ
words.thaiTranslation: ส่งอีเมลแจ้งความคืบหน้า / อัปเดตข้อมูล

words.definition: To guide and moderate a group dialogue so it stays logical and on schedule.
words.exampleSentence: The junior advisor was trained to facilitate a discussion on ecosystem restoration.
words.laoTranslation: ດໍາເນີນການສົນທະນາ
words.thaiTranslation: ดำเนินรายการสนทนา / นำการอภิปรายกลุ่ม

words.definition: Profound specialized knowledge in a targeted engineering, scientific, or agricultural field.
words.exampleSentence: Operating advanced remote sensing tools requires deep spatial technical expertise.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຊ່ຽວຊານທາງດ້ານເຕັກນິກ
words.thaiTranslation: ความเชี่ยวชาญทางเทคนิค

words.definition: To speak as the primary featured speaker opening an international symposium.
words.exampleSentence: The Assistant Professor will deliver a keynote address on green trade frameworks.
words.laoTranslation: ກ່າວປາຖະກະຖາຄັ້ງສໍາຄັນ
words.thaiTranslation: กล่าวปาฐกถาพิเศษครั้งสำคัญในที่ประชุม

words.definition: To guide a working team's strategic direction through expertise and respect.
words.exampleSentence: A senior advisor uses objective facts to exert leadership influence over the board.
words.laoTranslation: ສະແດງອິດທિພົນການນໍາພາ
words.thaiTranslation: แสดงอิทธิพลในการนำพา / บริหารบารมีนำทีม

words.definition: To build an open atmosphere where cross-functional team members share ideas safely.
words.exampleSentence: The workshop objective is to foster collaborative dialogue on climate change credit models.
words.laoTranslation: ສົ່ງເສີມການເຈລະຈາແບບຮ່ວມມື
words.thaiTranslation: ส่งเสริมการเจรจาเชิงสร้างสรรค์ร่วมกัน

words.definition: To compose a dense, polished abstract of a technical report for senior managers.
words.exampleSentence: Remember to write an executive summary that outlines calculated opportunity costs clearly.
words.laoTranslation: ຂຽນບົດສະຫຼຸບຫຍໍ້ສໍາລັບຜູ້ບໍລິຫານ
words.thaiTranslation: เขียนบทสรุปผู้บริหารสำหรับรายงาน

words.definition: Act of giving instructions, summaries, or parameters to a working team before a task.
words.exampleSentence: We will hold a mandatory briefing about the new AppSheet layout protocols.
words.laoTranslation: ການສະຫຼຸບລາຍງານຫຍໍ້
words.thaiTranslation: การบรีฟงาน / การสรุปข้อสั่งการ

words.definition: An internal office note used to circulate policy reminders or layout updates.
words.exampleSentence: The director sent a memo requiring all staff to log their hours via the app.
words.laoTranslation: ບັນທຶກຂໍ້ຄວາມຫຍໍ້
words.thaiTranslation: บันทึกข้อความภายใน / เมโม

words.definition: To make a confusing meeting argument or email sentence easy to understand.
words.exampleSentence: Could you please clarify the proposed mechanism for standard carbon tracking?
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ຈະແຈ້ງ / ຊີ້ແຈງ
words.thaiTranslation: อธิบายให้กระจ่าง / ชี้แจง

words.definition: To organize a complex technical task so that different people work effectively together.
words.exampleSentence: The advisor will co-ordinate the next round of multi-stakeholder survey interviews.
words.laoTranslation: ປະສານງານ / ຈັດລະບຽບຮ່ວມກັນ
words.thaiTranslation: ประสานงาน / จัดการร่วมกัน

words.definition: Thoroughly covering all technical data fields, constraints, and opportunity costs.
words.exampleSentence: We compiled a comprehensive brief regarding black garlic manufacturing setups.
words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ກວມລວມທຸກດ້ານ / ທີ່ຄົບຖ້ວນ
words.thaiTranslation: ที่ครอบคลุมทุกด้าน / ที่สมบูรณ์แบบ

words.definition: To officially manage, open, and lead the technical discussions of an office meeting.
words.exampleSentence: The junior advisor was chosen to chair the cross-departmental sync tomorrow.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນປະທານ (ກອງປະຊຸມ)
words.thaiTranslation: ทำหน้าที่เป็นประธานในที่ประชุม

words.definition: A specific piece of administrative work assigned to a collaborator or field group.
words.exampleSentence: Our immediate task is to update the progress status of the roselle project.
words.laoTranslation: ວຽກງານ / ໜ້າທີ່
words.thaiTranslation: งาน / ภารกิจที่ได้รับมอบหมาย

words.definition: The explicit theme or subject matter being debated in a presentation or forum.
words.exampleSentence: Soil nutrient retention using organic biochar is an excellent research topic.
words.laoTranslation: ຫົວຂໍ້
words.thaiTranslation: หัวข้อ / ประเด็นหลัก

words.definition: A medium or system that provides a structural staging area for communication.
words.exampleSentence: The symposium provides an international platform to highlight high-value agriculture.
words.laoTranslation: ເວທີປາໄສ / ເວທີສະແດງອອກ
words.thaiTranslation: เวทีระดับสากล / ช่องทางแลกเปลี่ยนความคิดเห็น

words.definition: Formal opening or closing comments delivered by a speaker at an office sync.
words.exampleSentence: The core advisor kept his closing remarks brief to respect our tight timeline.
words.laoTranslation: ຄໍາປາໄສຫຍໍ້ / ຄໍາເຫັນ
words.thaiTranslation: คำกล่าวปราศรัยย่อย / ข้อคิดเห็น

words.definition: To succeed in finishing something or reaching a aim, especially after a lot of work.
words.exampleSentence: If you practice every day, you will achieve your target fluency level.
words.laoTranslation: ບັນລຸ / ເຮັດໃຫ້ສຳເລັດ (ban-lu)
words.thaiTranslation: บรรลุ / ทำสำเร็จ (ban-lu)

words.definition: To find information, a place, or an object, especially for the first time.
words.exampleSentence: Researchers discover a rare plant variety growing near the stream.
words.laoTranslation: ຄົ້ນພົບ (khon-phop)
words.thaiTranslation: ค้นพบ / ตรวจพบ (khon-phop)

words.definition: Necessary or needed completely.
words.exampleSentence: Clean water and organic matter are essential for sapling development.
words.laoTranslation: ຈຳເປັນຢ່າງຍິ່ງ (cham-pen)
words.thaiTranslation: จำเป็นอย่างยิ่ง / ขาดไม่ได้ (cham-pen)

words.definition: A typical quality or an important part of something.
words.exampleSentence: The offline data syncing is a unique feature of this reporting app.
words.laoTranslation: ຄຸນລັກສະນະ / ຈຸດເດັ່ນ
words.thaiTranslation: คุณลักษณะ / จุดเด่น (khun-na-lak-sa-na)

words.definition: To become larger or greater in amount, number, or value.
