words.laoTranslation: ປະຢັດຊັບພະຍາກອນ
words.thaiTranslation: ประหยัดทรัพยากร / อนุรักษ์สิ่งของ (pra-yat-sap-pha-ya-kon)

words.definition: To be elevated into a higher administrative rank or project command seat level.
words.exampleSentence: After optimizing database pipeline speeds, she will get a promotion to senior analyst.
words.synonym: Be upgraded in rank, advance position
words.laoTranslation: ເລື່ອນຕຳແໜ່ງ (leun-tam-naeng)
words.thaiTranslation: เลื่อนตำแหน่ง / เลื่อนขั้นการทำงาน (leun-tam-naeng)

words.definition: To lay down an orderly systematic structural matrix blueprint for sequential tasks.
words.exampleSentence: We must sit down today and make a plan to restore the primary nursery tract.
words.laoTranslation: ວາງແຜນການ (wang-phaen-kan)
words.thaiTranslation: วางแผนการ / จัดทำแผนผังปฏิบัติงาน (wang-phaen)

words.definition: To engage in a strategic action that carries potential fallout variables or loss metrics.
words.exampleSentence: Cooperatives take a risk when scaling raw exports without locked wholesale pricing links.
words.laoTranslation: ສ່ຽງໄພ / ສ່ຽງເບິ່ງ (siang)
words.thaiTranslation: เสี่ยงดวง / ยอมรับความเสี่ยง (ยอมเสี่ยง)

words.definition: A unified methodology design layout where separate variables fuse together into one structure loop.
words.exampleSentence: The pilot village uses an integrated model combining ginger cultivation with biochar application.
words.laoTranslation: ຮູບແບບປະສົມປະສານ
words.thaiTranslation: โมเดลแบบบูรณาการ / ระบบครบวงจร (mo-den-bu-ra-na-kan)

words.definition: The radical drop in organic microbe contents and physical nutrient stability profiles of terrain.
words.exampleSentence: Continuous intensive herbicide usage triggers rapid soil degradation along watershed hillsides.
words.synonym: Dirt nutrient erosion, ground quality loss
words.laoTranslation: ການຊຸດໂຊມຂອງດິນ (kan-xut-xom)
words.thaiTranslation: การเสื่อมโทรมของชั้นดิน / ดินจืดดินเสีย (kan-sueam-som)

words.definition: To enforce uniform entry fields across variable logs to ensure smooth index compilation processing.
words.exampleSentence: The main objective of AppSheet validation logic is to standardize data collected from nurseries.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ຂໍ້ມູນເປັນມາດຕະຖານ
words.thaiTranslation: จัดมาตรฐานข้อมูล / ทำข้อมูลให้เป็นระบบ (tham-khomun)

words.definition: To break or cross over designated cutoff limit lines, triggering systematic response changes.
words.exampleSentence: When cross-border logistical timeline delays exceed thresholds, raw roselle stock spoiling speeds multiply.
words.synonym: Cross acceptable boundaries, breach cutoff points
words.antonym: Remain within limits, stay under cutoff
words.laoTranslation: ກາຍຂີດຈຳກັດ / ເກີນເກນມາດຕະຖານ
words.thaiTranslation: เกินขีดจำกัด / เกินเกณฑ์มาตรฐานที่ตั้งไว้ (kaen-ket)

words.definition: The holistic system of financial, social, and asset assets that support a household's existence cycle.
words.exampleSentence: Value addition centers provide a highly adaptive livelihood framework for smallholder cooperatives.
words.synonym: Income structure model, survival asset array
words.laoTranslation: ໂຄງຮ່າງການດຳລົງຊີວິດ
words.thaiTranslation: กรอบโครงสร้างการดำรงชีพ / แหล่งรายได้ชุมชน (krop-sip)

words.definition: To synchronize action energy fields across different collaborative departments or entities.
words.exampleSentence: The university and GIZ must coordinate efforts to safely extract native species seeds.
words.antonym: Work in complete isolation, mismatch deployments
words.laoTranslation: ປະສານງານຮ່ວມມື
words.thaiTranslation: ประสานงานร่วมแรงร่วมใจ / บูรณาการทำงาน (pra-san-ngan)

words.definition: The formal diagnostic research screening executed to audit if a system process outputs its intended results.
words.exampleSentence: The spatial research lab completed an efficacy verification of automated cloud-filtering scripts.
words.synonym: Validation testing matrix, productivity check loop
words.laoTranslation: ການພິສູດຢັ້ງຢືນປະສິດທິຜົນ
words.thaiTranslation: การพิสูจน์ยืนยันประสิทธิผลเชิงประจักษ์ (kan-phi-sut)

words.definition: The continuous, multi-point digital monitoring layout deployed across wide environmental grids.
words.exampleSentence: Introducing mesh sensors unlocks ubiquitous tracking of soil moisture parameters along slopes.
words.laoTranslation: ການຕິດຕາມທຸກຫົນທຸກແຫ່ງ
words.thaiTranslation: การติดตามความเคลื่อนไหวทุกหนแห่งแบบไร้รอยต่อ (kan-tit-tam)

words.definition: Economic activity concerned with the processing of raw materials and manufacture of goods in factories.
words.exampleSentence: The wellness tea industry is expanding rapidly across regional trade channels.
words.laoTranslation: ອຸດສາຫະກຳ (ut-sa-ha-kam)
words.thaiTranslation: อุตสาหกรรม (ut-sa-ha-kam)

words.definition: The standard of something as measured against other things of a similar kind; the degree of excellence of something.
words.exampleSentence: Applying high-grade biochar significantly improves the quality of degraded forest soil matrices.
words.laoTranslation: ຄຸນນະພາບ (khun-na-phap)
words.thaiTranslation: คุณภาพ (khun-na-phap)

words.definition: Bear all or part of the weight of; hold up or give assistance to.
words.exampleSentence: Local extension centers support smallholders with certified organic fertilizer setups.
words.laoTranslation: ສະໜັບສະໜູນ / ຊ່ວຍເຫຼືອ
words.thaiTranslation: สนับสนุน / ช่วยเหลือ (sa-nap-sa-nun)

words.definition: Take or carry people or goods from one place to another by means of a vehicle, aircraft, or ship.
words.exampleSentence: The railway makes it clean and efficient to transport roselle across borders.
words.laoTranslation: ການຂົນສົ່ງ (kan-khon-song)
words.thaiTranslation: การขนส่ง / โลจิสติกส์ (kan-khon-song)

words.definition: Differ in size, amount, degree, or nature from something else of the same general class.
words.exampleSentence: Soil moisture profiles vary drastically across alternative topographic elevations.
words.laoTranslation: ແຕກຕ່າງກັນ / ປ່ຽນແປງ
words.thaiTranslation: แตกต่างกัน / ผันผวนตามปัจจัย (phaen-phuan)

words.definition: The amount of money expected, required, or given in payment for an agricultural commodity.
words.exampleSentence: The spot price of premium garlic fluctuates depending on cross-border logistics flows.
words.laoTranslation: ລາຄາ
words.thaiTranslation: ราคา

words.definition: A regular stopping place on a public transportation route, especially a railway line.
words.exampleSentence: The survey site sits only three kilometers from the new cargo railway station.
words.laoTranslation: ສະຖານີ (sa-tha-ni)
words.thaiTranslation: สถานี (sa-tha-ni)

words.definition: A living organism of the kind exemplified by trees, shrubs, herbs, grasses, ferns, and mosses.
words.exampleSentence: We choose to plant native species tree lines to preserve catchment stability.
words.laoTranslation: ພືດ / ປູກພືດ (pheut)
words.thaiTranslation: พืช / ปลูกพืช (phuet)

words.definition: An area of indefinite extent, typically a large stretch of land.
words.exampleSentence: This specific forest tract contains endangered native evergreen trees.
words.laoTranslation: ຜືນແຜ່ນດິນ / ຕອນດິນ (ton-din)
words.thaiTranslation: ผืนที่ดิน / แปลงที่ดินขนาดใหญ่ (phuen-thi-din)

words.definition: An area or region distinguished from adjacent parts by a distinctive environmental or structural feature.
words.exampleSentence: The northern mountainous zone is perfectly suited for high-value wellness tea cultivation.
words.laoTranslation: ເຂດ / ເຂດແຄວ້ນ
words.thaiTranslation: เขต / พื้นที่เฉพาะ

words.definition: The preparation of land for growing crops.
words.exampleSentence: Intense mechanical tillage accelerates soil organic carbon degradation across slopes.
words.laoTranslation: ການໄຖພວນດິນ (kan-thai-phuan)
words.thaiTranslation: การไถพรวนดิน / การเตรียมดิน (kan-thai-phruan)

words.definition: A place where young plants and trees are grown for sale or planting out.
words.exampleSentence: The cooperative nursery tracks the survival metrics of native target seedlings.
words.laoTranslation: ໂຮງເພາະພັນພືດ (hong-pho)
words.thaiTranslation: โรงเพาะชำ / แปลงอนุบาลพืช (rong-phraw-cham)

words.definition: Bring the different elements of a complex activity or organization into a harmonious or efficient relationship.
words.exampleSentence: Advisors help coordinate cross-border standard certificates for herbal plants.
words.laoTranslation: ປະສານງານ (pa-san-ngan)
words.thaiTranslation: ประสานงาน / จับคู่ค่าพิกัด (pra-san-ngan)

words.definition: With various parts or aspects linked or coordinated into a unified whole.
words.exampleSentence: An integrated agroforestry model yields stable returns while conserving primary soil nutrients.
words.laoTranslation: ປະສົມປະສານ (pa-som-pa-san)
words.thaiTranslation: แบบครบวงจร / ผสานรวม (pha-san-ruam)

words.definition: Cause something to conform to a clear, official, and uniform agricultural metric framework.
words.exampleSentence: We must standardize the post-harvest sorting metrics to align with premium international wholesale grids.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ເປັນມາດຕະຖານ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้เป็นมาตรฐานเดียวกัน

words.definition: A numerical or structural factor that helps in defining a system or setting its limits.
words.exampleSentence: Adjust the model parameter to filter cloud noise from satellite rasters.
words.laoTranslation: ຕົວຊີ້ວັດ / ຕົວແປ (tua-pae)
words.thaiTranslation: พารามิเตอร์ / ตัวแปรควบคุม (pha-ra-mi-toe)

words.definition: The cultivation of a single crop on a piece of farmland to the exclusion of other species.
words.exampleSentence: Transitioning away from rubber monoculture protects smallholders from sudden market drops.
words.laoTranslation: ການປູກພືດຊະນິດດຽວ
words.thaiTranslation: การปลูกพืชเชิงเดี่ยว

words.definition: An owner or manager of a very small agricultural land holding.
words.exampleSentence: Each smallholder logs parcel boundary strings directly through the mobile app.
words.laoTranslation: ຊາວໄຮ່ນາຜູ້ມີຕອນດິນຂະໜາດນ້ອຍ
words.thaiTranslation: เกษตรกรรายย่อย (ka-set-tra-kon-ray-yoy)

words.definition: The magnitude or intensity that must be exceeded for a certain reaction or consequence to occur.
words.exampleSentence: If vegetation loss breaks the designated threshold, an automated code alert triggers.
words.laoTranslation: ຂີດຈຳກັດ / ເກນ cutoff
words.thaiTranslation: เกณฑ์เริ่มเปลี่ยน / ขีดจำกัดขั้นต่ำ (khet-rem-phli-an)

words.definition: Originate from; be produced by a specific foundational source.
words.exampleSentence: The key project policy goals emanate from the central GIZ sustainability charter.
words.laoTranslation: ຖອດຖອນມາຈາກ / ເກີດຈາກ
words.thaiTranslation: ส่งออกมาจาก / มีต้นตอมาจาก (me-ton-to-ma-chak)

words.definition: The ability to produce a desired or intended result.
words.exampleSentence: The clinic ran a study to observe the medical efficacy of the herbal ointment.
words.laoTranslation: ປະສິດທິຜົນ / ສັກກາຍະພາບ
words.thaiTranslation: ประสิทธิผล / ความสามารถในการออกฤทธิ์

words.definition: To continue happening or doing something.
words.exampleSentence: Please go on with your explanation of opportunity cost.
words.laoTranslation: ດຳເນີນຕໍ່ໄປ
words.thaiTranslation: ดำเนินต่อไป / เกิดขึ้นต่อไป (dam noen tor pai / koet kheun tor pai)

words.definition: To use something for help because other options have failed.
words.exampleSentence: When the main supply line broke, they had to fall back on traditional water storage.
words.laoTranslation: ຫັນໄປໃຊ້ສິ່ງອື່ນທົດແທນ
words.thaiTranslation: หันไปพึ่งพา (เมื่อไม่มีทางเลือกอื่น) (han pai phueng pha)

words.definition: To prepare oneself for an event, activity, or journey.
words.exampleSentence: We need to get ready for the field survey tomorrow.
words.laoTranslation: ກຽມພ້ອມ
words.thaiTranslation: เตรียมตัวให้พร้อม (triam tua hai phrom)

words.definition: To perform a systematic study or investigation to find facts.
words.exampleSentence: The university professors conduct research on climate change adaptation.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດການວິໄຈ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำวิจัย / ดำเนินการวิจัย (tham wi chai / dam noen kan wi chai)

words.definition: To supply enough goods or services to satisfy what people want.
words.exampleSentence: Local farmers struggle to meet the demand for clean vegetables.
words.laoTranslation: ຕອບສະໜອງຄວາມຕ້ອງການ
words.thaiTranslation: ตอบสนองความต้องการ (thop sa nong khwam tong kan)

words.definition: To make good use of an opportunity or resources.
words.exampleSentence: We should take advantage of the Laos-China railway for faster transport.
words.laoTranslation: ນຳໃຊ້ຜົນປະໂຫຍດຈາກ
words.thaiTranslation: ใช้ประโยชน์จาก... / เอาเปรียบ (chai pra yot chak / ao priap)

words.definition: Over a long period of time in the future.
words.exampleSentence: Investing in organic soil will pay off in the long run.
words.laoTranslation: ໃນໄລຍະຍາວ
words.thaiTranslation: ในระยะยาว (nai ra ya yaw)

words.definition: To have an effect or influence on an event or situation.
words.exampleSentence: Biochar can play a role in carbon sequestration.
words.laoTranslation: ມີບົດບາດ
words.thaiTranslation: มีบทบาทสำคัญ (mi bot bat sam khan)

words.definition: A very strong or noticeable similarity between two things.
words.exampleSentence: The processed black garlic had a striking resemblance to balsamic candy.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຄ້າຍຄືກັນຢ່າງຈະແຈ້ງ
words.thaiTranslation: ความคล้ายคลึงกันอย่างเห็นได้ชัด (khwam khlay khlueng kan yang hen dai chat)

words.definition: Normal or usual; not unusual or special.
words.exampleSentence: It was just an ordinary day at the office.
words.laoTranslation: ທົ່ວໄປ / ທໍາມະດາ
words.thaiTranslation: ธรรมดา / ปกติสามัญ (tham ma da)

words.definition: To watch carefully in order to learn or notice something.
words.exampleSentence: Researchers observe the growth rate of trees weekly.
words.laoTranslation: ສັງເກດການ
words.thaiTranslation: สังเกตการณ์ / เฝ้าดู (sang ket kan / fae du)

words.definition: To support or encourage the progress or growth of something.
words.exampleSentence: The center aims to promote green economy solutions.
words.laoTranslation: ສົ່ງເສີມ
words.thaiTranslation: ส่งเสริม / เลื่อนตำแหน่ง / ประชาสัมพันธ์ (song soem / luen tam naeng)

words.definition: To make suffering, deficiency, or a problem less severe.
words.exampleSentence: Sustainable agroforestry projects help alleviate rural poverty.
words.laoTranslation: ບັນເທົາ
words.thaiTranslation: บรรเทา / ทำให้น้อยลง (เช่น บรรเทาความเจ็บปวด) (ban thao)

words.definition: Making a certain situation or outcome look likely or possible.
words.exampleSentence: The humid climate in northern Laos is conducive to growing spices.
words.laoTranslation: ເອື້ອອໍານວຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ที่ช่วยส่งเสริม / เอื้อต่อ... (มักใช้กับสิ่งแวดล้อมหรือปัจจัย) (thi chuay song soem / uea tor)

words.definition: At all times; on all occasions.
words.exampleSentence: She always arrives on time.
words.laoTranslation: ຕະຫຼອດເວລາ (talort vela)
words.thaiTranslation: ตลอดเวลา (talot vela)

words.definition: Reflecting or emitting much light; shining.
words.exampleSentence: The sun is very bright today.
words.laoTranslation: ແຈ້ງ (cheng)
words.thaiTranslation: สว่าง (sawang)

words.definition: Pick out or select someone or something as being the best or most suitable.
words.exampleSentence: You can choose any book you like.
words.laoTranslation: ເລືອກ (leuark)
words.thaiTranslation: เลือก (leuark)

words.definition: Done, produced, or occurring every day.
words.exampleSentence: Exercise is part of my daily routine.
words.laoTranslation: ປະຈໍາວັນ (pajam van)
words.thaiTranslation: ประจำวัน (pracham wan)

words.definition: Containing nothing; not filled or occupied.
words.exampleSentence: The glass was empty so he poured some fresh water.
words.laoTranslation: ວ່າງເປົ່າ
words.thaiTranslation: ว่างเปล่า

words.definition: Give one's attention to a sound.
words.exampleSentence: Please listen carefully to the instructions.
words.laoTranslation: ຟັງ (fang)
words.thaiTranslation: ฟัง (fang)

words.definition: A very large expanse of sea.
words.exampleSentence: They sailed across the Atlantic Ocean.
words.laoTranslation: ມະຫາສະໝຸດ (maha samut)
words.thaiTranslation: มหาสมุทร (maha samut)

words.definition: Having or showing behavior that is respectful and considerate.
words.exampleSentence: The waiter was very polite and helpful.
words.laoTranslation: ສຸພາບ (suphab)
words.thaiTranslation: สุภาพ (suphap)

words.definition: The way in which one acts or conducts oneself.
words.exampleSentence: His good behavior earned him a reward.
words.laoTranslation: ພຶດຕິກໍາ (pheut ti kam)
words.thaiTranslation: พฤติกรรม (phruet ti kam)

words.definition: The capacity to have an effect on the character or development of someone.
words.exampleSentence: My parents had a major influence on my career choice.
words.laoTranslation: ອິດທິພົນ (it thi phon)
words.thaiTranslation: อิทธิพล (it thi phon)

words.definition: Easily seen or noticed; clear or apparent.
words.exampleSentence: There is a noticeable improvement in your English.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນຕາສັງເກດ (pen ta sang ket)
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นที่สังเกตเห็นได้ (pen thi sang ket hen dai)

words.definition: To make obscure or unclear in meaning.
words.exampleSentence: The legal wording tends to ambiguate the agreement.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ກໍາກວມ (het hai kam kuam)
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้กำกวม (tham hai kam kuam)

words.definition: To fail to do what you said you would do.
words.exampleSentence: If you break a promise, people won't trust you.
words.laoTranslation: ຜິດສັນຍາ (phit san nya)
words.thaiTranslation: ผิดสัญญา (phit sanya)

words.definition: To fail to properly appreciate something due to over-familiarity.
words.exampleSentence: We should not take for granted the ecosystem services provided by local rivers.
words.laoTranslation: ເບິ່ງຂ້າມຄວາມສໍາຄັນ
words.thaiTranslation: มองข้ามความสำคัญ / ทึกทักไปเอง

words.definition: To reach an agreement where both sides give up something.
words.exampleSentence: After hours of talking, they came to a compromise.
words.laoTranslation: ຕົກລົງກັນໄດ້ (tok long kan dai)
words.thaiTranslation: ประนีประนอม (pra ni pra nom)

words.definition: To strictly follow a set of beliefs or rules.
words.exampleSentence: A good leader must adhere to principles.
words.laoTranslation: ຍຶດໝັ້ນໃນຫຼັກການ (yeut man)
words.thaiTranslation: ยึดมั่นในหลักการ (yuet man nai lak kan)

words.definition: To make a situation appear less hopeful or happy.
words.exampleSentence: The scandal cast a shadow over his career.
words.laoTranslation: ບັງລັດສະໝີ/ເຮັດໃຫ້ມົວໝອງ
words.thaiTranslation: ทอดเงาบดบัง/ทำให้หม่นหมอง

words.definition: To return something to a place or recall a memory.
words.exampleSentence: Please bring back the technical equipment when you finish the layout mapping.
words.laoTranslation: ເອົາມາຄືນ
words.thaiTranslation: นำกลับมา

words.definition: To register at a hotel, airport counter, or workshop desk.
words.exampleSentence: You need to check in at the hotel registration desk by 2 PM.
words.laoTranslation: ແຈ້ງເຂົ້າພັກ / ລົງທະບຽນ
words.thaiTranslation: เช็คอิน / ลงทะเบียนเข้าพัก

words.definition: To have a harmonious, friendly relationship with others.
words.exampleSentence: He gets along well with international project advisors.

words.definition: Not harmful to the environment or ecological systems during utilization or manufacturing.
words.exampleSentence: The resort uses eco-friendly packaging made from locally harvested roselle fibers.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນມິດຕໍ່ສິ່ງແວດລ້ອມ
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นมิตรต่อสิ่งแวดล้อม

words.definition: The amount for which something can be sold on a given open market.
words.exampleSentence: Value-addition methods significantly boost the market value of raw herbs.
words.laoTranslation: ມູນຄ່າຕະຫຼາດ
words.thaiTranslation: มูลค่าตลาด

words.definition: A natural fertilizer derived from animal matter, human excreta, or vegetable matter like biochar.
words.exampleSentence: Switching to organic fertilizer improves soil microbiome setups over multiple seasons.
words.laoTranslation: ຝຸ່ນອິນຊີ
words.thaiTranslation: ปุ๋ยอินทรีย์

words.definition: A concise, structured description of an issue that needs to be addressed by a planning team.
words.exampleSentence: Drafting a clear problem statement is the initial step in creating a cause-and-effect matrix.
words.laoTranslation: ບົດອະທິບາຍບັນຫາ / ຂໍ້ຄວາມສະແດງບັນຫາ
words.thaiTranslation: ข้อความระบุปัญหา / การตั้งโจทย์ปัญหา

words.definition: A system of maintaining standards by testing a sample of the output.
words.exampleSentence: Rigorous quality control prevents defective batches from reaching buyers.
words.laoTranslation: ການຄວບຄຸມຄຸນນະພາບ
words.thaiTranslation: การควบคุมคุณภาพ

words.definition: The basic unprocessed or primary organic material from which value-added goods are produced.
words.exampleSentence: Fresh organic garlic serves as the essential raw material for creating black garlic batches.
words.laoTranslation: ວັດຖຸດິບ
words.thaiTranslation: วัตถุดิบ / สรรพสิ่งขั้นต้นที่ยังไม่แปรรูป

words.definition: Essential chemical minerals stored in earth layers required for high plant health.
words.exampleSentence: Applying premium biochar mixes securely locks vital soil nutrients against runoff.
words.laoTranslation: ທາດອາຫານໃນດິນ
words.thaiTranslation: สารอาหารในดิน

words.definition: The specific demographic group or consumer block at which a presentation, brand, or crop is aimed.
words.exampleSentence: High-end health stores in regional capitals serve as our primary target market.
words.laoTranslation: ຕະຫຼາດເປົ້າໝາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ตลาดเป้าหมาย

words.definition: Surroundings or conditions that make an outcome very easy or possible.
words.exampleSentence: The high altitude provides a conducive environment for growing premium tea.
words.laoTranslation: ສະພາບແວດລ້ອມທີ່ເອື້ອອໍານວຍ
words.thaiTranslation: สภาพแวดล้อมที่เอื้ออำนวย

words.definition: To gain entry into a secure mobile application, website, or data portal.
words.exampleSentence: Field workers must log into the AppSheet portal to sync daily tree audits.
words.laoTranslation: ເຂົ້າສູ່ລະບົບ
words.thaiTranslation: เข้าสู่ระบบ

words.definition: To originate from, be caused by, or develop out of a specific root cause.
words.exampleSentence: Many logistics bottlenecks stem from redundant paperwork rules at custom checkposts.
words.laoTranslation: ເກີດມາຈາກ / ມີສາເຫດມາຈາກ
words.thaiTranslation: เกิดมาจาก / มีต้นตอมาจาก

words.definition: The variety of plant and animal life in the world or in a particular habitat or ecosystem.
words.exampleSentence: Preserving canopy architecture directly secures the upland forest's rich biodiversity.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຫຼາກຫຼາຍທາງຊີວະນາໆພັນ
words.thaiTranslation: ความหลากหลายทางชีวภาพ

words.definition: Not correct, true, or exact.
words.exampleSentence: Inaccurate satellite imagery interpretation can lead to errors in forest mapping.
words.laoTranslation: ບໍ່ຖືກຕ້ອງ / ບໍ່ຊັດເຈນ
words.thaiTranslation: ไม่ถูกต้อง / ไม่แม่นยำ

words.definition: The dependence of two or more people or things on each other, like neighboring economies.
words.exampleSentence: The regional logistics corridor highlights the growing economic interdependence among bordering nations.
words.laoTranslation: ການເພິ່ງພາອາໄສເຊິ່ງກັນແລະກັນ
words.thaiTranslation: การพึ่งพาอาศัยซึ่งกันและกัน

words.definition: Calculate or assess an amount, distance, project value, or timeline incorrectly.
words.exampleSentence: If we miscalculate the delivery dates, the roselle flowers might ferment during rail transit.
words.laoTranslation: ຄິດໄລ່ຜິດ / ປະເມີນຜິດພາດ
words.thaiTranslation: คำนวณผิดพลาด / ประเมินคลาดเคลื่อน

words.definition: A condition that must be fulfilled before something else can happen.
words.exampleSentence: Meeting standard agricultural norms is a strict precondition for international trade.
words.laoTranslation: ເງື່อนໄຂເບື້ອງຕົ້ນ / ສິ່ງທີ່ຕ້ອງມີກ່ອນ
words.thaiTranslation: เงื่อนไขเบื้องต้น / ข้อกำหนดล่วงหน้า

words.definition: Not producing or clear of good results or high agricultural yields.
words.exampleSentence: Adding organic fertilizer transformed the unproductive soil into fertile cropland.
words.laoTranslation: ບໍ່ເກີດຜົນຜະລິດ / ດິນຈືດ
words.thaiTranslation: ไม่ก่อให้เกิดผลผลิต / ไร้ประโยชน์

words.definition: Prone to change, fail, or fluctuate unpredictably.
words.exampleSentence: Smallholders often suffer when regional market prices remain highly unstable.
words.laoTranslation: ບໍ່ໝັ້ນຄົງ / ບໍ່ຄົງທີ່
words.thaiTranslation: ไม่มั่นคง / ไม่คงที่

words.definition: The action or process of arranging agricultural items or spatial layers into structural groups.
words.exampleSentence: We applied a supervised classification algorithm to sort tree canopy types from the raster layer.
words.laoTranslation: ການຈັດແບ່ງປະເພດ / ການຈໍາແນກ
words.thaiTranslation: การจัดหมวดหมู่ / การจำแนกประเภท

words.definition: To manage or exploit something principally for financial gain.
words.exampleSentence: The facility aims to help farmers commercialize processed roselle tea extracts.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ເປັນການຄ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้เป็นไปในเชิงพาณิชย์

words.definition: The action of improving or enhancing the quality or value of something.
words.exampleSentence: Soil enrichment via natural compost boosts the chemical profile of medicinal plants.
words.laoTranslation: ການປັບປຸງໃຫ້ອຸດົມສົມບູນ
words.thaiTranslation: การเพิ่มพูน / การทำให้บริบูรณ์

words.definition: A person who chooses to work toward protecting the natural world from pollution.
words.exampleSentence: The environmentalist advised using biochar to sequester carbon effectively.
words.laoTranslation: ນັກອະນຸລັກສິ່ງແວດລ້ອມ
words.thaiTranslation: นักอนุรักษ์สิ่งแวดล้อม

words.definition: The removal of contaminants or impurities from something.
words.exampleSentence: The essential oil extraction line requires a final purification stage.
words.laoTranslation: ການເຮັດໃຫ້ບໍລິສຸດ / ການກັ່ນຕອງ
words.thaiTranslation: การทำให้บริสุทธิ์ / การกลั่นกรอง

words.definition: The quality of having a documented history of production or source tracking.
words.exampleSentence: Standard quality certification requires full traceability of the raw materials.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມສາມາດໃນການຕິດຕາມແຫຼ່ງທີ່ມາ
words.thaiTranslation: ความสามารถในการตรวจสอบย้อนกลับ

words.definition: The high upper layer formed by mature tree crowns in a forest ecosystem, blocking solar exposure.
words.exampleSentence: The thick jungle canopy maintains an ideal microclimate for sensitive undergrowth herbs.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮືອນຍອດ / ຈອມປ່າ
words.thaiTranslation: เรือนยอดไม้ / หลังคาป่า

words.definition: Financial assets or liquid wealth used to fund a business enterprise or setup.
words.exampleSentence: Upgrading to industrial steam distillation units requires substantial capital.
words.laoTranslation: ທຶນ / ເງິນທຶນ
words.thaiTranslation: ทุน / เงินทุน

words.definition: A raw material or primary agricultural product that can be bought and sold.
words.exampleSentence: Dried garlic is a highly valuable commodity in regional cross-border trade.
words.laoTranslation: ສິນຄ້າໂພຄະພັນ
words.thaiTranslation: สินค้าโภคภัณฑ์

words.definition: Facts and statistics collected together for reference, analytical parsing, or spatial rendering.
words.exampleSentence: The technician downloaded daily weather data from the remote automated monitoring station.
words.laoTranslation: ຂໍ້ມູນ
words.thaiTranslation: ข้อมูล

words.definition: A biological community of interacting organisms and their physical environment.
words.exampleSentence: Maintaining a healthy forest ecosystem protects local headwaters from massive erosion.
words.laoTranslation: ລະບົບນິເວດ
words.thaiTranslation: ระบบนิเวศ

words.definition: The most favorable conditions or amount for obtaining a given result.
words.exampleSentence: Maintaining the optimum temperature is critical for black garlic fermentation.
words.laoTranslation: ລະດັບທີ່ເໝາະສົມທີ່ສຸດ
words.thaiTranslation: ระดับที่เหมาะสมที่สุด / จุดที่คุ้มค่าที่สุด

words.definition: Available for purchase, often at a reduced price.
words.exampleSentence: The newly packaged wellness teas will go on sale next month.
words.laoTranslation: ວາງຈໍາໜ່າຍ
words.thaiTranslation: วางจำหน่าย

words.definition: A structured conceptual guide used to organize research steps or problem-solving.
words.exampleSentence: The expert used a rigorous analytical framework to map regional transit bottlenecks.
words.laoTranslation: ຂອບແນວຄິດການວິເຄາະ
words.thaiTranslation: กรอบการวิเคราะห์

words.definition: A formal arrangement between two nations or parties regarding trade or cooperation.
words.exampleSentence: The two neighbors signed a bilateral agreement to ease agricultural customs tariffs.
words.laoTranslation: ສັນຍາສອງຝ່າຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ข้อตกลงทวิภาคี

words.definition: A certificate showing that a government or company has paid to remove a certain amount of carbon dioxide from the environment.
words.exampleSentence: Generating a certified carbon credit provides a reliable alternative income stream for smallholders.
words.laoTranslation: ສິນເຊື່ອກາກບອນ
words.thaiTranslation: คาร์บอนเครดิต

words.definition: A specific plan or system modified to fit the exact needs of a user.
words.exampleSentence: AppSheet allowed us to build a customized solution for tracking field data.
words.laoTranslation: ການແກ້ໄຂບັນຫາທີ່ປັບແຕ່ງສະເພາະ
words.thaiTranslation: แนวทางแก้ไขที่ปรับแต่งเฉพาะ

words.definition: The process of assigning monetary value to environmental or business factors.
words.exampleSentence: Conducting an economic valuation of ecosystem services helps secure green funds.
words.laoTranslation: ການປະເມີນມູນຄ່າທາງເສດຖະກິດ
words.thaiTranslation: การประเมินมูลค่าทางเศรษฐกิจ

words.definition: A metabolic process that converts sugar to acids, gases, or alcohol via microbes.
words.exampleSentence: The strict heat profile during the fermentation process changes garlic into black garlic.
words.laoTranslation: ຂະບວນການໝັກ
words.thaiTranslation: กระบวนการหมัก

words.definition: The construction and upgrade of physical networks like roads, power, and rails.
words.exampleSentence: The railway line marks a major step in regional infrastructural development.
words.laoTranslation: ການພັດທະນາໂຄງລ່າງພື້ນຖານ
words.thaiTranslation: การพัฒนาโครงสร้างพื้นฐาน

words.definition: The ability of an organization or university to complete core tasks effectively.
words.exampleSentence: The grant was designed to boost the institutional capacity for scientific research.
words.laoTranslation: ຂີດຄວາມສາມາດຂອງອົງກອນ
words.thaiTranslation: ขีดความสามารถขององค์กร

words.definition: The coordinated system of shipping, warehousing, and tracking assets.
words.exampleSentence: A solid logistical network prevents fresh agricultural products from rotting.
words.laoTranslation: ເຄືອຂ່າຍການຂົນສົ່ງສິນຄ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: เครือข่ายโลจิสติกส์

words.definition: A small-scale preliminary test designed to evaluate project feasibility.
words.exampleSentence: We initiated a pilot study to test user responses to the roselle cosmetic line.
words.laoTranslation: ການສຶກສາທົດລອງ
words.thaiTranslation: การศึกษาขอบข่ายนำร่อง

words.definition: A statistical model used to forecast future outcomes or environmental changes.
words.exampleSentence: We developed a predictive model to assess how climate shifts affect tea farms.
words.laoTranslation: ແບບຈໍາລອງການຄາດຄະເນ
words.thaiTranslation: แบบจำลองการคาดการณ์

words.definition: The rate or efficiency at which agricultural or business goods are generated.
words.exampleSentence: Adding organic biochar significantly elevated the soil productivity level.
words.laoTranslation: ລະດັບສະມັດຖະພາບການຜະລິດ
words.thaiTranslation: ระดับผลิตภาพ / ระดับความสามารถในการผลิต

words.definition: An assessment focusing on descriptive properties, processes, and interviews rather than figures.
words.exampleSentence: The advisor complemented the numerical graphs with a clear qualitative analysis.
words.laoTranslation: ການວິເຄາະດ້ານຄຸນນະພາບ
words.thaiTranslation: การวิเคราะห์เชิงคุณภาพ

words.definition: The physical state or chemical capacity of soil to supply vital plant nutrients in adequate amounts.
words.exampleSentence: Integrating compost and biochar compounds builds long-term soil fertility in home gardens.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມອຸດົມສົມບູນຂອງດິນ
words.thaiTranslation: ความอุดมสมบูรณ์ของดิน

words.definition: Targeted practical advice, specialized training, or support provided by experts.
words.exampleSentence: Advisors provide technical assistance to help small farms meet sanitary trade codes.
words.laoTranslation: ການຊ່ວຍເຫຼືອທາງດ້ານເຕັກນິກ
words.thaiTranslation: ความช่วยเหลือทางวิชาการ / ด้านเทคนิค

words.definition: The mental ability to switch between thinking about two different concepts.
words.exampleSentence: Critical thinking training sharpens a planner's cognitive flexibility during crises.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຢືດຢຸ່ນທາງດ້ານສະຕິປັນຍາ
words.thaiTranslation: ความยืดหยุ่นทางสติปัญญา

words.definition: A long-term line of development that preserves resources for the future.
words.exampleSentence: The eco-friendly timber program sets the rural forest on a sustainable trajectory.
words.laoTranslation: ເສັ້ນທາງການພັດທະນາແບບຍືນຍົງ
words.thaiTranslation: แนวทางการพัฒนาที่ยั่งยืน

words.definition: To explain the cause of something, or comprise a particular proportion of.
words.exampleSentence: Smallholder spice networks account for forty percent of agricultural exports.
words.laoTranslation: ອະທິບາຍ / ກວມເອົາອັດຕາສ່ວນ
words.thaiTranslation: อธิบายสาเหตุ / คิดเป็นสัดส่วน

words.definition: To clarify, resolve, or explain a misunderstanding or complex problem.
words.exampleSentence: The advisory brief helped clear up confusion regarding standard custom tarrifs.
words.laoTranslation: ແກ້ໄຂ / ເຮັດໃຫ້ກະຈ່າງແຈ້ງ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้กระจ่าง / สะสาง (ปัญหา)

words.definition: To use information, experience, or resources to help complete a task.
words.exampleSentence: When drafting the problem statements, we draw on field data logged last year.
words.laoTranslation: ນໍາໃຊ້ (ປະສົບການ ຫຼື ຂໍ້ມູນ)
words.thaiTranslation: นำเอาออกมาใช้ / อาศัย (ข้อมูลหรือประสบการณ์)

words.definition: To examine a large amount of information very thoroughly to find key points.
words.exampleSentence: Researchers must sift through large batches of satellite imagery to map canopy loss.
words.laoTranslation: ຄົ້ນຫາຢ່າງລະອຽດ / ຄັດຈ້ອນ
words.thaiTranslation: คัดแยกอย่างละเอียด / ตรวจสอบอย่างถี่ถ้วน

words.definition: To replant an area of land with trees after the previous cover was removed.
words.exampleSentence: Local communities plan to reforest degraded watersheds along the railway corridor.
words.laoTranslation: ປູກປ່າທົດແທນ
words.thaiTranslation: ปลูกป่าทดแทน

words.definition: Lack of equality or equivalence between parts or aspects of something.
words.exampleSentence: Market asymmetry often leaves smallholder garlic farmers at a disadvantage.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມບໍ່ສົມດຸນ / ຄວາມບໍ່ສະເໝີພາບ
words.thaiTranslation: ความไม่สมดุล / ความไม่เท่าเทียม

words.definition: The state or condition of living or existing together at the same time or in the same place.
words.exampleSentence: The seminar explored the coexistence of traditional farming and high-tech agritourism.
words.laoTranslation: ການຢູ່ຮ່ວມກັນ
words.thaiTranslation: การอยู่ร่วมกัน

words.definition: To break down a complex technical problem statement or report into simpler components.
words.exampleSentence: The consultant used problem tree analysis to deconstruct systemic institutional barriers.
words.laoTranslation: ແຍກແຍະ / ວິເຄາະໂຄງສ້າງ
words.thaiTranslation: แยกแยะ / วิเคราะห์โครงสร้างย่อย

words.definition: To inform a person of a danger or problem before it occurs.
words.exampleSentence: Early warning apps forewarn horticulturists about impending flash floods.
words.laoTranslation: ເຕືອນລ່ວງໜ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: เตือนล่วงหน้า

words.definition: Below the usual or required level of quality or structural safety.
words.exampleSentence: Customs officials reject agricultural shipments that use substandard packaging.
words.laoTranslation: ຕໍ່າກວ່າພາລະດັບ / ບໍ່ໄດ້ມາດຕະຖານ
words.thaiTranslation: ต่ำกว่ามาตรฐาน / ไม่ได้มาตรฐาน

words.definition: Not capable of working, growing, or developing successfully.
words.exampleSentence: Without deep well irrigation, expanding okra farming in this dry zone is nonviable.
words.laoTranslation: ບໍ່ສາມາດເປັນໄປໄດ້ຕົວຈິງ
words.thaiTranslation: ไม่สามารถเป็นไปได้จริง / ไม่รอด

words.definition: Having the opposite of the desired effect; hindering instead of helping progress.
words.exampleSentence: Adding chemical fertilizers to a pure biochar experiment can be counterproductive.
words.laoTranslation: ຂັດຕໍ່ຜົນປະໂຫຍດ / ໃຫ້ຜົນກົງກັນຂ້າມ
words.thaiTranslation: ตรงกันข้ามกับที่คาดไว้ / ไม่เป็นผลดี

words.definition: The process of making something secure, steady, or unfluctuating.
words.exampleSentence: Price stabilization policies prevent extreme spikes in local chili markets.
words.laoTranslation: ການເຮັດໃຫ້ໝັ້ນຄົງ
words.thaiTranslation: การทำให้มั่นคง / การสร้างเสถียรภาพ

words.definition: To enlarge or vary the range of products, crops, or field investments.
words.exampleSentence: Farmers are encouraged to diversify their plots by intercropping roselle with timber.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ຫຼາກຫຼາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้หลากหลาย / กระจายความเสี่ยง

words.definition: The quality of being easy to see, understand, or parse, especially regarding structural project trees.
words.exampleSentence: Mapping out the root causes provides ultimate clarity for drafting the intervention document.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຈະແຈ້ງ / ຄວາມຊັດເຈນ
words.thaiTranslation: ความชัดเจน / ความโปร่งใส

words.definition: The quality or state of being exposed to the possibility of harm, crop failure, or market drops.
words.exampleSentence: Relying on a single cash crop increases a smallholder cooperative's financial vulnerability.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມອ່ອນໄຫວ / ຄວາມຊຸດໂซມງ່າຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ความเปราะบาง / ความเสี่ยงที่จะถูกกระทบ

words.definition: The availability of liquid cash reserves to cover instant operational expenses.
words.exampleSentence: Agribusiness processing plants need steady liquidity to pay farmers on time.
words.laoTranslation: ສະພາບຄ່ອງທາງດ້ານການເງິນ

words.definition: The action of making an agricultural practice more extreme or maximizing field outputs.

words.definition: Wood prepared comprehensively for use in building structures, carpentry, or industrial manufacturing pathways.
words.exampleSentence: Sustainable forestry systems balance annual timber harvesting volumes with active native seedling replanting.
words.laoTranslation: ໄມ້ທ່ອນ / ໄມ້ປປຸກສ້າງ
words.thaiTranslation: ไม้ซุง / เนื้อไม้ที่ใช้ในการก่อสร้าง

words.definition: The process or period of gathering in crops when they are mature.
words.exampleSentence: The annual garlic harvest provides crucial primary income for hundreds of families.
words.laoTranslation: ການເກັບກ່ຽວຜົນຜະລິດ
words.thaiTranslation: การเก็บเกี่ยวผลผลิต

words.definition: Predict or estimate a future trend, crop yield timeline, or specific weather sequence.
words.exampleSentence: Meteorologists forecast an unseasonably long dry period that could strain early vegetable nurseries.
words.laoTranslation: ພະຍາກອນ / ຄາດຄະເນລ່ວງໜ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: พยากรณ์ / คาดหมายล่วงหน้า

words.definition: To gradually wear away soil or geologic structures via weathering actions of running water or heavy wind patterns.
words.exampleSentence: Stripping vegetation cover causes topsoil layers to erode rapidly during the intense wet monsoon seasons.
words.laoTranslation: ເຊາະເຈື່ອນ / ເປື່ອຍຫ້ຽນ
words.thaiTranslation: กัดเซาะ / สึกกร่อนทำลาย

words.definition: A useful or valuable quality, person, skill, or structural physical property owned by an entity.
words.exampleSentence: High-resolution satellite imagery is a vital asset for spatial environmental planning workflows.
words.laoTranslation: ຊັບສິນ / ສິ່ງທີ່ມີຄຸນຄ່າ
words.thaiTranslation: สินทรัพย์ / สิ่งมีค่า

words.definition: A sum of money granted by the state to assist an industry or business.
words.exampleSentence: Government subsidy programs help poor farmers afford high-quality biochar equipment.
words.laoTranslation: ເງິນອຸດໜູນ
words.thaiTranslation: เงินอุดหนุน

words.definition: The carrying or conveying of people, travelers, or cargo from one spot to another.

words.thaiTranslation: การเดินทางผ่าน / การส่งผ่านทรานสิต

words.definition: A fixed share of something that a person or group is entitled to receive or send.

words.laoTranslation: ໂຄຕ້າ / ຈໍານວນຈໍາກັດ

words.definition: To estimate or determine the monetary worth or commercial value of an item.
words.exampleSentence: The team will valuate the carbon storage capacity of the native forest zone.
words.laoTranslation: ປະເມີນມູນຄ່າ
words.thaiTranslation: ประเมินมูลค่า

words.definition: To perform a sequence of actions in order to achieve a particular goal.
words.exampleSentence: Cooperatives must take steps to comply with regional packaging standards.
words.laoTranslation: ດໍາເນີນມາດຕະການ / ລົງມືເຮັດ

words.definition: Available for immediate sale or use in a warehouse or shop.

words.laoTranslation: ມີໃນສາງ / ມີພ້ອມຈໍາໜ່າຍ
words.thaiTranslation: มีในคลัง / มีพร้อมขาย

words.definition: An exhaustive structural assessment evaluating the practical, economic, and technical viability of a plan.
words.exampleSentence: We submitted a comprehensive feasibility study regarding the establishment of the agri-standard facility.
words.laoTranslation: ບົດວິພາກເສດຖະກິດ-ເຕັກນິກ / ບົດສຶກສາຄວາມເປັນໄປໄດ້

words.laoTranslation: ການກັກເກັບກາກບອນ / ການດູດຊຶມກາກບອນ
words.thaiTranslation: การกักเก็บคาร์บอน / การดูดซับคาร์บอน

words.definition: The structural sequence of processes involved in the production and distribution of an agricultural commodity.
words.exampleSentence: The regional railway infrastructure has significantly optimized the fresh okra supply chain.
words.laoTranslation: ຫ່ວງໂສ້ອຸປະທານ / ສາຍໂສ້ການສະໜອງ
words.thaiTranslation: ห่วงโซ่อุปทาน / สายโซ่อุปทาน

words.definition: The measurable alteration, damage, or benefit caused to an ecosystem by operational practices.
words.exampleSentence: Every major railway infrastructure expansion requires an advance environmental impact evaluation study.
words.laoTranslation: ຜົນກະທົບຕໍ່ສິ່ງແວດລ້ອມ

words.definition: A monetary benefit offered to encourage specific actions or behaviors.
words.exampleSentence: Carbon offset payouts provide a strong financial incentive to avoid clear-cutting.
words.laoTranslation: ສິ່ງຈູງໃຈທາງດ້ານການເງິນ
words.thaiTranslation: สิ่งจูงใจทางการเงิน

words.definition: The regulated commercial exchange of goods executed between two specific nations.
words.exampleSentence: Customs updates have significantly streamlined bilateral trade flows this year.
words.laoTranslation: ການຄ້າທວິພາຄີ / ການຄ້າສອງຝ່າຍ

words.definition: The structured process of translating a project idea into a concrete implementation design.
words.exampleSentence: During project formulation, identifying risk assumptions prevents future delays.
words.laoTranslation: ການກຳນົດໂຄງການ / ການຮ່າງໂຄງການ
words.thaiTranslation: การจัดทำโครงการ / การวางแผนโครงการ

words.definition: A high-level choice that alters long-term goals or resource allocations.
words.exampleSentence: Investing in local processing units instead of middleman sales was a strategic decision.
words.laoTranslation: ການຕັດສິນໃຈເຊີງຍຸດທະສາດ

words.definition: A step-by-step framework compiled to help workers execute routine actions.
words.exampleSentence: Every worker must review the standard operating procedure for herbal oil extraction.
words.laoTranslation: ຂັ້ນຕອນການປະຕິບັດງານທີ່ເປັນມາດຕະຖານ
words.thaiTranslation: ขั้นตอนการปฏิบัติงานที่เป็นมาตรฐาน

words.definition: A structural policy or regulatory rule inside entities that limits development.
words.exampleSentence: Opaque certificate compliance rules form an institutional barrier for village co-ops.

words.thaiTranslation: อุปสรรคทางสถาบัน / ข้อจำกัดเชิงระบบ

words.definition: The complex interactive links between social behaviors and economic parameters.
words.exampleSentence: Specialized border zones alter the socio-economic dynamic of mountain districts.
words.laoTranslation: ພົນລະວັດທາງດ້ານເສດຖະກິດ-ສັງຄົມ

words.definition: To discover something valuable or interesting entirely by accident.
words.exampleSentence: While assessing mountain plots, foresters happened to stumble upon a rare native orchid.
words.laoTranslation: ພົບພໍ້ໂດຍບັງເອີນ
words.thaiTranslation: พบโดยบังเอิญ / บังเอิญเจอ

words.definition: To grow a crop among plants of a different kind, optimizing soil utilization and field space.
words.exampleSentence: Smallholders often intercrop fast-growing chilies alongside their young native tree seedlings.
words.laoTranslation: ປູກພືດສະຫຼັບ / ປູກພືດຮ່ວມ
words.thaiTranslation: ปลูกพืชแซม / ปลูกพืชร่วมกัน

words.definition: To heat a drying chamber or processing unit before introducing raw agricultural inputs.
words.exampleSentence: Always preheat the solar cabinet before loading fresh roselle blossoms.

words.thaiTranslation: อุ่นเครื่องล่วงหน้า / ทำความร้อนก่อน

words.definition: The branch of economics concerned with large-scale or general economic factors and regional indicators.
words.exampleSentence: Understanding macroeconomics is crucial when analyzing the long-term impact of transcontinental railways.
words.laoTranslation: ມະຫາພາກເສດຖະສາດ
words.thaiTranslation: เศรษฐศาสตร์มหภาค

words.definition: Relating to or characteristic of regions bordering on the tropics, featuring distinct wet and dry spells.
words.exampleSentence: The northern highlands feature a subtropical environment suited for specialty root crop cultivation.
words.laoTranslation: ກິ່ງຮ້ອນຊຸ່ມ / ເຂດກິ່ງຮ້ອນ

words.definition: To evaluate or assess something again, especially with a view to changes.
words.exampleSentence: Project planners must reevaluate the budget if shipping tariffs increase suddenly.
words.laoTranslation: ປະເມີນຄືນໃໝ່
words.thaiTranslation: ประเมินผลใหม่ / ทบทวนอีกครั้ง

words.definition: A failure to function normally or work correctly.

words.thaiTranslation: การทำงานผิดปกติ / เครื่องขัดข้อง

words.definition: Abnormally or excessively sensitive, either chemically or operationally.
words.exampleSentence: The electronic monitoring sensors are hypersensitive to changes in soil humidity.
words.laoTranslation: ອ່ອນໄຫວເກີນໄປ / ໄວຕໍ່ການກະຕຸ້ນ

words.definition: The deliberate act of preparing land, planting crops, and caring for their physiological development.

words.laoTranslation: ການປູກຝັງ / ການເພາະປູກ

words.definition: Adapt something to modern needs or habits, typically by installing advanced tools or machinery.

words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ທັນສະໄໝ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้ทันสมัย / ปรับปรุงให้สอดคล้องกับปัจจุบัน

words.definition: The capacity to maintain environmental, economic, or agricultural systems over extended timelines.
words.exampleSentence: Organic biochar production enhances the long-term sustainability of village farming plots.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຍືນຍົງ
words.thaiTranslation: ความยั่งยืน

words.definition: A person who concentrates primarily on a particular subject or highly technical field.
words.exampleSentence: The forestry specialist trained local extension workers on native species collection.
words.laoTranslation: ຜູ້ຊ່ຽວຊານສະເພາະດ້ານ
words.thaiTranslation: ผู้เชี่ยวชาญเฉพาะทาง

words.definition: Performed according to a systematic, highly organized, and logical process.
words.exampleSentence: A methodical investigation using problem trees isolates the true origin of crop loss.
words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ມີລະບົບລະບຽບ / ເຮັດຕາມຂັ້ນຕອນ
words.thaiTranslation: อย่างเป็นระบบ / มีระเบียบแบบแผน

words.definition: To take the chance to gain advantage from a specific economic resource or trend.
words.exampleSentence: Agrarian cooperatives want to capitalize on fast transit links to target markets.
words.laoTranslation: ສວຍໂອກາດສ້າງຜົນປະໂຫຍດ / ຫັນເປັນທຶນ
words.thaiTranslation: ใช้ประโยชน์เพื่อสร้างกำไร / เปลี่ยนเป็นทุน

words.definition: The overall rate and volume of agricultural or industrial output per unit of input resource used.
words.exampleSentence: Drip irrigation infrastructure upgrades elevated the annual productivity of the garlic plots.
words.laoTranslation: ປະສິດທິພາບການຜະລິດ / ສະມັດຖະພາບ
words.thaiTranslation: ผลิตภาพ / ความสามารถในการผลิตผลผลิต

words.definition: A prolonged period of abnormally low precipitation, resulting in water shortages.
words.exampleSentence: Adding organic matter helps retain vital moisture during a severe seasonal drought.
words.laoTranslation: ໄພແຫ້ງແລ້ງ
words.thaiTranslation: ภัยแล้ง

words.definition: A substance obtained or distilled from a plant or herb via technical processes.
words.exampleSentence: Medicinal extract from local roots is highly valued for high-end wellness oils.
words.laoTranslation: ສານສະກັດ
words.thaiTranslation: สารสกัด

words.definition: Relating to conditions that affect hygiene and health, especially clean water.
words.exampleSentence: Meeting international sanitary standards is a strict prerequisite for cross-border trade.
words.laoTranslation: ຖືກຫຼັກອະນາໄມ / ສະອາດ
words.thaiTranslation: ถูกสุขอนามัย / สะอาดปลอดภัย

words.definition: An official systematic inspection of an organization's accounts, workflow, or production standards.
words.exampleSentence: The agricultural center requested an external audit to verify their organic export compliance.
words.laoTranslation: ການກວດສອບຢ່າງເປັນລະບົບ
words.thaiTranslation: การตรวจสอบอย่างเป็นระบบ / การตรวจประเมิน

words.definition: Estimating or determining the magnitude, amount, or volume of something.
words.exampleSentence: The mobile tool is perfect for gauging overall canopy density values.
words.laoTranslation: ການວັດແທກ / ການປະເມີນ
words.thaiTranslation: การวัดขนาด / การประเมิน

words.definition: A commercial enterprise or business undertaking involving a degree of financial risk.
words.exampleSentence: The family pooled their savings to start a roselle tea processing venture.
words.laoTranslation: ການຮ່ວມທຶນ / ທຸລະກິດສ່ຽງ
words.thaiTranslation: การร่วมทุน / การเสี่ยงลงทุน

words.definition: To happen, occur, or be systematically conducted at a specific venue.
words.exampleSentence: The regional agricultural expo will take place near the railway station terminal.
words.laoTranslation: ຈັດຂຶ້ນ / ເກີດຂຶ້ນ
words.thaiTranslation: เกิดขึ้น / จัดขึ้น ณ

words.definition: To maintain a continuous, accurate record of changing operational data or metrics.
words.exampleSentence: Supervisors use an AppSheet tool to keep track of daily processing yields.
words.laoTranslation: ຕິດຕາມ / ບັນທຶກ
words.thaiTranslation: ติดตามความคืบหน้า / บันทึกข้อมูล

words.definition: A rail transportation link crossing international borders to facilitate fast logistics.
words.exampleSentence: The cross-border railway has minimized transit friction for global spice shipments.
words.laoTranslation: ທາງລົດໄຟຂ້າມແດນ
words.thaiTranslation: ทางรถไฟข้ามพรมแดน

words.definition: The structural process of recovering a severely degraded or deforested habitat.
words.exampleSentence: Planting diverse native timber species drives real, localized ecosystem restoration.
words.laoTranslation: ການຟື້ນຟູລະບົບນିເວດ
words.thaiTranslation: การฟื้นฟูระบบนิเวศ

words.definition: The production of premium agricultural commodities yielding high returns per area unit.
words.exampleSentence: The state promotes high-value agriculture like organic medicinal teas for export profit.
words.laoTranslation: ກະສິກຳທີ່ມີມູນຄ່າສູງ
words.thaiTranslation: เกษตรกรรมมูลค่าสูง

words.definition: A systematic fiscal analysis of an enterprise's balance sheets and capital costs.
words.exampleSentence: A rigorous financial evaluation is vital before obtaining international credit lines.
words.laoTranslation: ການປະເມິ່ນຜົນທາງດ້ານການເງິນ
words.thaiTranslation: การประเมินผลทางการเงิน

words.definition: A concentrated aromatic liquid compound carefully distilled from targeted plant parts.
words.exampleSentence: The lab processes wild medicinal leaves into pure therapeutic essential oil formulas.
words.laoTranslation: ນ້ຳມັນຫອມລະເຫີຍ
words.thaiTranslation: น้ำมันหอมระเหย

words.definition: Capable of being decomposed by bacteria or other living organisms over time naturally.
words.exampleSentence: Farmers are encouraged to use biodegradable mulch films made from agricultural waste compounds.
words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ຍ່ອຍສະຫຼາຍໄດ້ຕາມທຳມະຊາດ
words.thaiTranslation: ที่ย่อยสลายได้ตามธรรมชาติ

words.definition: Rain, snow, sleet, or hail that falls to the ground.
words.exampleSentence: The regional forest canopy absorbs heavy monsoon precipitation, protecting topsoil health.
words.laoTranslation: ຢາດນ້ຳຟ້າ / ຝົນ
words.thaiTranslation: หยาดน้ำฟ้า / ปริมาณน้ำฝน

words.definition: Produce more of a commodity or agricultural crop than is needed or wanted by the market.
words.exampleSentence: When smallholders overproduce certain cash crops, local market prices crash dramatically.
words.laoTranslation: ຜະລິດຫຼາຍເກີນຄວາມຕ້ອງການ
words.thaiTranslation: ผลิตมากเกินไป / ผลิตเกินความต้องการตลาด

words.definition: Having parts or trade dynamics that fail to correspond in scale, power, or arrangement.
words.exampleSentence: Smallholders often operate within an asymmetrical relationship with cross-border middlemen.
words.laoTranslation: ບໍ່ສົມດຸນ / ບໍ່ສະເໝີພາບ

words.laoTranslation: ຈົດບັນທຶກການປະຊຸມ
