words.exampleSentence: The prominent climate scientist was invited to deliver a keynote address at the opening ceremony.
words.laoTranslation: ກ່າວປາຖະກະຖາຄັ້ງສຳຄັນ / ຂຶ້ນກ່າວສູນທອນພົດຫຼັກ
words.thaiTranslation: กล่าวปาฐกถาพิเศษ / ขึ้นบรรยายสุนทรพจน์หลัก

words.definition: To guide a working team's strategic direction through expertise and respect.
words.exampleSentence: A senior advisor uses objective facts to exert leadership influence over the board.
words.laoTranslation: ສະແດງອິດທિພົນການນໍາພາ
words.thaiTranslation: แสดงอิทธิพลในการนำพา / บริหารบารมีนำทีม

words.definition: To build an open atmosphere where cross-functional team members share ideas safely.
words.exampleSentence: The workshop objective is to foster collaborative dialogue on climate change credit models.
words.laoTranslation: ສົ່ງເສີມການເຈລະຈາແບບຮ່ວມມື
words.thaiTranslation: ส่งเสริมการเจรจาเชิงสร้างสรรค์ร่วมกัน

words.definition: To compose a dense, polished abstract of a technical report for senior managers.
words.exampleSentence: Remember to write an executive summary that outlines calculated opportunity costs clearly.
words.laoTranslation: ຂຽນບົດສະຫຼຸບຫຍໍ້ສໍາລັບຜູ້ບໍລິຫານ
words.thaiTranslation: เขียนบทสรุปผู้บริหารสำหรับรายงาน

words.definition: To express an idea, feedback comment, or meeting point in an alternative, clearer way.
words.exampleSentence: Let me rephrase my earlier comment regarding the cross-border transit hours.
words.laoTranslation: ເວົ້າຄືນໃໝ່ / ປ່ຽນຄໍາເວົ້າໃຫມ່
words.thaiTranslation: กล่าวใหม่ / เรียบเรียงใหม่

words.definition: Agreed upon or participated in by three or more parties, such as regional cross-border trade accords.
words.exampleSentence: Advisors carefully reviewed the multilateral transit treaty governing logistics across the region.
words.laoTranslation: ພຫຸພາຄີ / ຫຼາຍຝ່າຍ
words.thaiTranslation: พหุภาคี / หลายฝ่าย

words.definition: To connect technical ideas, data systems, or organizational reports closely together.
words.exampleSentence: The report details how canopy density metrics interconnect with soil carbon levels.
words.laoTranslation: ເຊື່ອມໂຍງເຂົ້າກັນ / ພົວພັນກັນ
words.thaiTranslation: เชื่อมโยงเข้าด้วยกัน / สัมพันธ์กัน

words.definition: Not involving spoken language, such as using gestures or posture during presentations.
words.exampleSentence: A confident leader uses nonverbal cues to establish trust during a workshop keynote.
words.laoTranslation: ບໍ່ມີວາຈາ / ບໍ່ໃຊ້ຄໍາເວົ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: อวัจนภาษา / ไม่ใช้คำพูด

words.definition: To deny the truth of a statement in a report or email by asserting the opposite.
words.exampleSentence: These new satellite imagery findings completely contradict our baseline field assessment.
words.laoTranslation: ຂັດແຍ່ງ / ປະຕິເສດ
words.thaiTranslation: ขัดแย้ง / โต้แย้ง

words.definition: Capable of expressing technical arguments and strategic ideas clearly in a speech.
words.exampleSentence: She is a highly articulate presenter who excels at handling hostile Q&A sessions.
words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ສະແດງອອກຢ່າງຈະແຈ້ງ / ເວົ້າເກັ່ງ
words.thaiTranslation: ที่สามารถถ่ายทอดได้ดี / ชัดถ้อยชัดคำ

words.definition: The state of forming a united, integrated, and harmonized working team or report structure.
words.exampleSentence: Using structured transition phrases adds logical cohesion to your technical brief.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມກົມກຽວ / ຄວາມສາມັກຄີ
words.thaiTranslation: ความสถิต / ความสามัคคี / การเชื่อมโยงอย่างมีเหตุผล

words.definition: To complete the ultimate version of a trade contract, technical layout, or team agenda.
words.exampleSentence: We need an extra team synchronization session to finalize the standard protocols.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ສໍາເລັດ / ສະຫຼຸບຂັ້ນສຸດທ້າຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้เสร็จสมบูรณ์ / สรุปขั้นตอนสุดท้าย

words.definition: Fluent, elegant, and persuasive speaking ability demonstrated by keynote speakers.
words.exampleSentence: Her eloquence at the international forestry symposium won the support of foreign donors.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຄ່ອງແຄ້ວສະຫຼະສະຫຼວຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ความสละสลวยทางภาษา / ความมีวาทศิลป์

words.definition: The arrangement or positioning of team workflows in accordance with corporate targets.
words.exampleSentence: Strategic alignment between regional advisors ensures smooth project implementation.
words.laoTranslation: ການຈັດວາງໃຫ້ສອດຄ່ອງກັນ
words.thaiTranslation: การจัดแนวทางให้ตรงกัน / การประสานสอดคล้อง

words.definition: Good reason or structural proof provided in a report to defend an infrastructure cost.
words.exampleSentence: The brief includes a clear economic justification based on calculated opportunity costs.
words.laoTranslation: ການໃຫ້ເຫດຜົນ / ຂໍ້ພິສູດ
words.thaiTranslation: การให้เหตุผลแนวคิด / ข้ออ้างอิงความชอบธรรม

words.definition: Act of giving instructions, summaries, or parameters to a working team before a task.
words.exampleSentence: We will hold a mandatory briefing about the new AppSheet layout protocols.
words.laoTranslation: ການສະຫຼຸບລາຍງານຫຍໍ້
words.thaiTranslation: การบรีฟงาน / การสรุปข้อสั่งการ

words.definition: To communicate a message, technical concept, or strategic intent via email or speech.
words.exampleSentence: Try to use precise agricultural terms to convey your recommendations accurately.
words.laoTranslation: ສື່ສານ / ຖ່າຍທອດຄວາມຄິດ
words.thaiTranslation: สื่อสาร / ถ่ายทอดความหมาย

words.definition: The arrangement of relations between elements in a report, presentation, or system.
words.exampleSentence: A clear structure helps an audience follow a complex technical argument.
words.laoTranslation: ໂຄງສ້າງ
words.thaiTranslation: โครงสร้าง

words.definition: An internal office note used to circulate policy reminders or layout updates.
words.exampleSentence: The director sent a memo requiring all staff to log their hours via the app.
words.laoTranslation: ບັນທຶກຂໍ້ຄວາມຫຍໍ້
words.thaiTranslation: บันทึกข้อความภายใน / เมโม

words.definition: A brief statement or account of the main technical points of a long report or talk.
words.exampleSentence: Always include an executive summary at the very beginning of a project brief.
words.laoTranslation: ບົດສະຫຼຸບຫຍໍ້
words.thaiTranslation: บทสรุป / ย่อความ

words.definition: The circumstances or systemic setting that form the environment for an event or statement.
words.exampleSentence: Without local economic context, these raw yield numbers are easily misinterpreted.
words.laoTranslation: ບໍລິບົດ / ສະພາບແວດລ້ອມ
words.thaiTranslation: บริบท / สภาพแวดล้อมทางความคิด

words.definition: The general character, style, or attitude of a piece of writing or a speech.
words.exampleSentence: Maintain a polite, formal tone when answering administrative queries via email.
words.laoTranslation: ນ້ຳສຽງ / ທ່າທີການເວົ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: น้ำเสียง / โทนเสียงของการสื่อสาร

words.definition: To make a confusing meeting argument or email sentence easy to understand.
words.exampleSentence: Could you please clarify the proposed mechanism for standard carbon tracking?
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ຈະແຈ້ງ / ຊີ້ແຈງ
words.thaiTranslation: อธิบายให้กระจ่าง / ชี้แจง

words.definition: The official written record of what was said, decided, and assigned at a meeting.
words.exampleSentence: The administrative assistant typed up the minutes and shared them via email.
words.laoTranslation: ບົດບັນທຶກກອງປະຊຸມ
words.thaiTranslation: รายงานการประชุม

words.definition: A formal assessment of a technical report, presentation draft, or employee outcome.
words.exampleSentence: The peer review process ensures high rigorous scientific standards at our university.
words.laoTranslation: ການທົບທວນ / ການກວດກາ
words.thaiTranslation: การทบทวน / การตรวจประเมิน

words.definition: An important problem or constraint that a team needs to debate and resolve.
words.exampleSentence: The working group spent all afternoon addressing the cross-border logistics issue.
words.laoTranslation: ບັນຫາ / ຂໍ້ຂັດແຍ່ງ
words.thaiTranslation: ประเด็น / ปัญหา

words.definition: The relative position, progress state, or official standing of a project asset.
words.exampleSentence: What is the current verification status of our standard certification application?
words.laoTranslation: ສະຖານະ / ສະພາບການ
words.thaiTranslation: สถานะ / ความคืบหน้า

words.definition: To state, present, or utter a formal speech, keynote, or workshop summary.
words.exampleSentence: The coordinator will deliver the opening remarks at the regional forum.
words.laoTranslation: ກ່າວ (ປາໄສ) / ນໍາສະເໜີ
words.thaiTranslation: กล่าว / นำเสนอ

words.definition: To settle or find a definitive solution to a team conflict, error, or bottleneck.
words.exampleSentence: We must schedule a sync to resolve the layout errors in the technical chart.
words.laoTranslation: ແກ້ໄຂ (ບັນຫາ)
words.thaiTranslation: แก้ไขปัญหา / ปัดเป่าข้อขัดแย้ง

words.definition: A member of a selected group of experts who participates in a public forum debate.
words.exampleSentence: Each panelist has five minutes to deliver their opening perspective.
words.laoTranslation: ຜູ້ຮ່ວມອະພິປາຍ / ຄະນະກໍາມະການ
words.thaiTranslation: ผู้ร่วมอภิปราย / ผู้ร่วมเสวนาบนเวที

words.definition: To give a concise summary of the primary targets and indicators of a project.
words.exampleSentence: The purpose of this morning brief is to outline the goals of our new app.
words.laoTranslation: ກໍານົດເປົ້າໝາຍໃຫ້ຈະແຈ້ງ / ສະຫຼຸບເປົ້າຫມາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: สรุปโครงร่างเป้าหมาย / กำหนดเป้าหมาย

words.definition: To stay focused on the current topic without introducing irrelevant ideas.
words.exampleSentence: We have a tight agenda, so please keep to the point during your review updates.
words.laoTranslation: ເວົ້າໃຫ້ກົງປະເດັນ / ເວົ້າເຂົ້າເລື່ອງ
words.thaiTranslation: พูดให้ตรงประเด็น / ไม่ออกนอกเรื่อง

words.definition: To write or state a short version of technical results or survey data fields.
words.exampleSentence: The technical team will summarize the findings in the final chapter.
words.laoTranslation: ສະຫຼຸບຜົນການວິໄຈ / ສະຫຼຸບຜົນໄດ້ຮັບ
words.thaiTranslation: สรุปผลการวิจัย / สรุปสิ่งที่ค้นพบ

words.definition: To offer a high-level summary of a technical project framework or setup.
words.exampleSentence: Let me provide an overview of the regional trade dynamics before we start.
words.laoTranslation: ໃຫ້ພາບລວມ / ອະທິບາຍຫຍໍ້
words.thaiTranslation: ให้ภาพรวม / อธิบายสรุปภาพกว้าง

words.definition: To guide, moderate, and manage a group dialogue regarding a project theme.
words.exampleSentence: The senior advisor will lead a discussion on standard operating practices.
words.laoTranslation: ນໍາພາການສົນທະນາ
words.thaiTranslation: นำการอภิปราย / นำการสนทนา

words.definition: To officially set up a calendar date and time for a team alignment call.
words.exampleSentence: We need to schedule a meeting with the laboratory compliance auditors.
words.laoTranslation: ກໍານົດເວລານັດຫມາຍປະຊຸມ
words.thaiTranslation: นัดหมายการประชุม / จัดตารางประชุม

words.definition: To distribute new progress parameters or status corrections to coworkers.
words.exampleSentence: I will share the updates regarding the NASA data access via email.
words.laoTranslation: ແບ່ງປັນຂໍ້ມູນອັບເດດ
words.thaiTranslation: แบ่งปันข้อมูลอัปเดต / แจ้งข่าวความคืบหน้า

words.definition: To arrive at an agreement by both sides making mutual concessions in a dispute.
words.exampleSentence: After long debate, the two transport companies managed to reach a compromise.
words.laoTranslation: ບັນລຸຂໍ້ຕົກລົງຮ່ວມກັນ / ພົບກັນເຄິ່ງທາງ
words.thaiTranslation: บรรลุข้อตกลงร่วมกัน / ประนีประนอม

words.definition: To signal that the audience may begin asking queries to a keynote speaker.
words.exampleSentence: Once the presentation concludes, the panel will be open for questions.
words.laoTranslation: ເປີດໂອກາດໃຫ້ຖາມຄໍາຖາມ
words.thaiTranslation: เปิดโอกาสให้ซักถาม

words.definition: To compose an internal structural notification or policy reminder for office staff.
words.exampleSentence: The coordinator requested me to draft a memo regarding the train schedules.
words.laoTranslation: ຮ່າງບັນທຶກຂໍ້ຄວາມ
words.thaiTranslation: ร่างบันทึกข้อความภายใน

words.definition: To participate vigorously, sharing ideas during a workshop or presentation.
words.exampleSentence: Every regional partner is expected to take active part in the panel tracks.
words.laoTranslation: ມີສ່ວນຮ່ວມຢ່າງຫ້າວຫັນ
words.thaiTranslation: มีส่วนร่วมอย่างแข็งขัน

words.definition: To present the opening background and professional credentials of a panel guest.
words.exampleSentence: It is an absolute honor to introduce the speaker for today's keynote address.
words.laoTranslation: ແນະນໍາຜູ້ບັນລະຍາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: แนะนำวิทยากร / แนะนำผู้พูด

words.definition: To establish the general mood, quality, or standard of an assembly or report.
words.exampleSentence: The director's supportive opening remarks set the tone for the teamwork retreat.
words.laoTranslation: ກໍານົດທິດທາງ / ສ້າງບັນຍາກາດ
words.thaiTranslation: กำหนดแนวทาง / สร้างบรรยากาศเชิงหลัก

words.definition: To redefine a goal to ensure every coworker understands the strategic direction.
words.exampleSentence: Before we subdivide tasks, let us clearly clarify the objective of this brief.
words.laoTranslation: ຊີ້ແຈງເປົ້າໝາຍໃຫ້ຊັດເຈນ
words.thaiTranslation: ชี้แจงเป้าหมายให้ชัดเจน

words.definition: To systematically go through the planned meeting tracks before starting.
words.exampleSentence: Let us quickly review the agenda to see if any items need shifting.
words.laoTranslation: ທົບທວນວາລະກອງປະຊຸມ
words.thaiTranslation: ทบทวนวาระการประชุม

words.definition: To plan, direct, and facilitate an active practical learning session for colleagues.
words.exampleSentence: The forestry department plans to run a workshop on satellite monitoring.
words.laoTranslation: ຈັດກອງປະຊຸມສໍາມະນາ / ຈັດເວີກຊັອບ
words.thaiTranslation: จัดเวิร์กช็อป / ดำเนินการสัมมนาเชิงปฏิบัติการ

words.definition: To give the formal introductory speech that initiates a major conference or forum.
words.exampleSentence: The Assistant Professor will deliver opening remarks at the regional expo.
words.laoTranslation: ກ່າວຄໍາປາໄສເປີດກອງປະຊຸມ
words.thaiTranslation: กล่าวเปิดงานอย่างเป็นทางการ / กล่าวต้อนรับ

words.definition: To combine diverse, complicated technical ideas into a clean, actionable model.
words.exampleSentence: An effective coordinator must synthesize complex viewpoints during regional debates.
words.laoTranslation: ສັງເຄາະທັດສະນະທີ່ຊັບຊ້ອນ
words.thaiTranslation: สังเคราะห์ความคิดเห็นที่ซับซ้อน

words.definition: To systematically lead separate corporate entities to follow the same policies.
words.exampleSentence: The main challenge is to drive institutional alignment across three strict ministries.
words.laoTranslation: ຊຸກຍູ້ການຮ່ວມມືລະຫວ່າງສະຖາບັນ
words.thaiTranslation: ขับเคลื่อนความสอดคล้องเชิงสถาบัน

words.definition: To ensure that data analysis and technical reports follow the highest strict standards.
words.exampleSentence: We must maintain academic rigor when mapping forest canopy changes in AppSheet.
words.laoTranslation: ຮັກສາຄວາມຖືກຕ້ອງທາງວິຊາການ
words.thaiTranslation: รักษาความถูกต้องแม่นยำทางวิชาการ

words.definition: Involving or carried out between different sectors or departments of an office.
words.exampleSentence: The coordinator organized an interdepartmental meeting to synchronize field tasks.
words.laoTranslation: ລະຫວ່າງພະແນກ / ຂ້າມຂະແໜງການ
words.thaiTranslation: ระหว่างแผนก / ข้ามกองงาน

words.definition: To arrange a time for a business meeting, briefing, or keynote speech in advance.
words.exampleSentence: We should pre-schedule the conference tracks to avoid overlapping technical panels.
words.laoTranslation: ກໍານົດເວລາລ່ວງໜ້າ / ນັດໝາຍໄວ້ກ່ອນ
words.thaiTranslation: จัดตารางล่วงหน้า / กำหนดการล่วงหน้า

words.definition: To bring different elements or team members into a relationship that ensures efficiency.
words.exampleSentence: We need to co-ordinate our presentation slots before the regional conference begins.
words.laoTranslation: ປະສານງານ / ຈັດແຈງ
words.thaiTranslation: ประสานงาน / จัดระเบียบ

words.definition: To fail to express technical data, report details, or strategic intentions clearly.
words.exampleSentence: If we miscommunicate the core requirements, the AppSheet prototype layout will fail.
words.laoTranslation: ສື່ສານຜິດພາດ
words.thaiTranslation: สื่อสารผิดพลาด / เข้าใจความหมายคลาดเคลื่อน

words.definition: To give excessive importance to a single point or issue in a report or speech.
words.exampleSentence: Do not overemphasize short-term opportunity costs at the expense of long-term carbon gains.
words.laoTranslation: ເນັ້ນໜັກເກີນຄວາມຈິງ / ໃຫ້ຄວາມສໍາຄັນເກີນໄປ
words.thaiTranslation: เน้นย้ำมากเกินไป / ให้ความสำคัญมากเกินไป

words.definition: A smaller committee filtered from a main board to address a specific office agenda.
words.exampleSentence: The regional standard center formed a subcommittee to audit laboratory compliance.
words.laoTranslation: ອະນຸກໍາມະການ
words.thaiTranslation: อนุกรรมการ / คณะทำงานย่อย

words.definition: An argument or set of reasons put forward to oppose an idea developed in another speech.
words.exampleSentence: The keynote panelist presented a brilliant counterargument backed by satellite data.
words.laoTranslation: ຂໍ້ໂຕ້ແຍ່ງ / ເຫດຜົນຄັດຄ້ານ
words.thaiTranslation: ข้อโต้แย้ง / เหตุผลหักล้าง

words.definition: The addition of extra details, context, or structural points to a brief or report.
words.exampleSentence: The director sent an email requesting further elaboration on the agricultural targets.
words.laoTranslation: ການຂະຫຍາຍຄວາມ / ການລົງເລິກລາຍລະອຽດ
words.thaiTranslation: การขยายความ / การลงรายละเอียดเพิ่มเติม

words.definition: The obligation of a team member to accept responsibility for their assigned actions.
words.exampleSentence: Clear project documentation builds transparent transparency and accountability.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຮັບຜິດຊອບ / ພັນທະທີ່ກວດສອບໄດ້
words.thaiTranslation: ความรับผิดชอบที่ตรวจสอบได้ / ภาระรับผิดชอบ

words.definition: In a way that holds together perfectly, creating a logical flow in a speech or document.
words.exampleSentence: The presentation slides were woven cohesively to tell a compelling project story.
words.laoTranslation: ຢ່າງກົມກຽວ / ຢ່າງຕໍ່ເນື່ອງມີເຫດຜົນ
words.thaiTranslation: อย่างสอดคล้องต่อเนื่อง / อย่างเป็นอันหนึ่งอันเดียวกัน

words.definition: A colleague or external partner with whom a person coauthors a report or study.
words.exampleSentence: He mentioned his university collaborator during the opening keynote remarks.
words.laoTranslation: ຜູ້ຮ່ວมງານ / ຜູ້ຮ່ວມມື
words.thaiTranslation: ผู้ร่วมงาน / ผู้ร่วมมือ

words.definition: Thoroughly covering all technical data fields, constraints, and opportunity costs.
words.exampleSentence: We compiled a comprehensive brief regarding black garlic manufacturing setups.
words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ກວມລວມທຸກດ້ານ / ທີ່ຄົບຖ້ວນ
words.thaiTranslation: ที่ครอบคลุมทุกด้าน / ที่สมบูรณ์แบบ

words.definition: Tactful and sensitive when handling difficult cross-departmental debates or emails.
words.exampleSentence: The manager gave a diplomatic response to pre-empt a major team conflict.
words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ມີລັກສະນະທາງການທູດ / ທີ່ຜ່ອນສັ້ນຜ່ອນຍາວ
words.thaiTranslation: ที่มีศิลปะในการทูต / ที่ประนีประนอมถนอมน้ำใจ

words.definition: A general summary or high-level baseline outline of a technical project.
words.exampleSentence: The consultant started with a brief overview of the regional railway metrics.
words.laoTranslation: ພາບລວມ / ບົດສະຫຼຸບໂດຍຫຍໍ້
words.thaiTranslation: ภาพรวม / สรุปย่อ

words.definition: The assembled group of listeners, partners, or specialists at a conference session.
words.exampleSentence: The speaker engaged the audience by asking about their direct garden management experience.
words.laoTranslation: ຜູ້ຟັງ / ມວນຊົນຜູ້ຊົມ
words.thaiTranslation: ผู้ฟัง / ผู้ชม

words.definition: Act as chairperson of a formal meeting, panel discussion, or university keynote session.
words.exampleSentence: The assistant professor was chosen to chair the session on climate change mitigation.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນປະທານ (ກອງປະຊຸມ)
words.thaiTranslation: ทำหน้าที่ประธานในที่ประชุม / นั่งเก้าอี้ประธาน

words.definition: A piece of work to be done or faced, especially an analytical or spreadsheet modeling pipeline.
words.exampleSentence: The technician completed the task of updating the AppSheet field mapping variables.
words.laoTranslation: ໜ້າວຽກ / ພາລະກິດ
words.thaiTranslation: ภารกิจ / งานที่ต้องทำ

words.definition: The explicit theme or subject matter being debated in a presentation or forum.
words.exampleSentence: Soil nutrient retention using organic biochar is an excellent research topic.
words.laoTranslation: ຫົວຂໍ້
words.thaiTranslation: หัวข้อ / ประเด็นหลัก

words.definition: A brief written record of facts, decisions, or figures to aid memory during office sessions.
words.exampleSentence: He made a quick note of the specific satellite imagery file format required.
words.laoTranslation: ບັນທຶກຫຍໍ້
words.thaiTranslation: บันทึกย่อ / ข้อความย่อ

words.definition: Contributions, technical opinions, or data fields supplied by a collaborator or expert.
words.exampleSentence: We need expert input from the local advisor regarding border customs delays.
words.laoTranslation: ຄໍາຄິດເຫັນ / ຂໍ້ມູນປ້ອນເຂົ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: ข้อมูลที่ป้อนเข้า / ความคิดเห็นสนับสนุน

words.definition: The main center of interest, priority, or targeted attention in a report or keynote speech.
words.exampleSentence: The primary focus of this project brief is generating extra farmer income.
words.laoTranslation: ຈຸດສຸມ / ສິ່ງທີ່ເນັ້ນໜັກ
words.thaiTranslation: จุดโฟกัส / จุดเน้นย้ำ

words.definition: A medium or system that provides a structural staging area for communication.
words.exampleSentence: The symposium provides an international platform to highlight high-value agriculture.
words.laoTranslation: ເວທີປາໄສ / ເວທີສະແດງອອກ
words.thaiTranslation: เวทีระดับสากล / ช่องทางแลกเปลี่ยนความคิดเห็น

words.definition: Formal opening or closing comments delivered by a speaker at an office sync.
words.exampleSentence: The core advisor kept his closing remarks brief to respect our tight timeline.
words.laoTranslation: ຄໍາປາໄສຫຍໍ້ / ຄໍາເຫັນ
words.thaiTranslation: คำกล่าวปราศรัยย่อย / ข้อคิดเห็น

words.definition: To arrange your keynote concepts, data slides, and summaries in a logical layout.
words.exampleSentence: Always structure a presentation to address audience constraints first.
words.laoTranslation: ຈັດໂຄງສ້າງການນໍາສະເໜີ
words.thaiTranslation: จัดโครงสร้างการนำเสนอ

words.definition: To systematically record all formal actions, decisions, and deadlines during a meeting.
words.exampleSentence: The project assistant was assigned to keep the minutes for the committee track.
words.laoTranslation: ຈົດບັນທຶກບົດບັນທຶກກອງປະຊຸມ
words.thaiTranslation: จดบันทึกรายงานการประชุม

words.definition: To transmit an email verifying that a report layout or sync date is approved.
words.exampleSentence: Please send a confirmation email once you receive the standard certification brief.
words.laoTranslation: ສົ່ງຂໍ້ຄວາມຢືນຢັນ
words.thaiTranslation: ส่งอีเมลยืนยัน

words.definition: To manage and facilitate an interactive practical session on technical frameworks.
words.exampleSentence: He was requested to lead a workshop on carbon accounting tracking tools.
words.laoTranslation: ນໍາພາການສໍາມະນາ / ເປັນວິທະຍາກອນເວີກຊັອບ
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นวิทยากรจัดเวิร์กช็อป / นำการสัมมนาเชิงปฏิบัติการ

words.definition: To officially initiate a formal office discussion, session, or coordination call.
words.exampleSentence: The department director will open the meeting sharp at nine o'clock.
words.laoTranslation: ເປີດກອງປະຊຸມ
words.thaiTranslation: เปิดการประชุม

words.definition: To write the preliminary version of a business plan, setup strategy, or framework.
words.exampleSentence: The advisory group plans to draft a proposal for the standard validation center.
words.laoTranslation: ຮ່າງຂໍ້ສະເໜີໂຄງການ
words.thaiTranslation: ร่างข้อเสนอโครงการ

words.definition: To direct a group of diverse collaborators to arrive at an aligned strategic choice.
words.exampleSentence: A core skill for leaders is the ability to build team consensus during disputes.
words.laoTranslation: ສ້າງຄວາມເຫັນພ້ອມເປັນເອກະພາບ
words.thaiTranslation: สร้างมติเห็นพ้องต้องกันในทีม

words.definition: To state or write a condensed abstract covering primary technical findings.
words.exampleSentence: The final slides provide a summary of calculated opportunity costs.
words.laoTranslation: ສະຫຼຸບຫຍໍ້ໃຫ້ຊາບ / ໃຫ້ບົດສະຫຼຸບຫຍໍ້
words.thaiTranslation: สรุปใจความสำคัญให้ / ให้บทสรุปย่อ

words.definition: To manage and answer technical queries raised by an audience after a presentation.
words.exampleSentence: The keynote speaker will handle the Q&A session using a slido platform.
words.laoTranslation: ຕອບຄໍາຖາມຊັກຖາມ / ຄຸມຊ່ວງຖາມ-ຕອບ
words.thaiTranslation: จัดการช่วงถาม-ตอบ / ตอบคำถามผู้ฟัง

words.definition: To greet conference attendees and panel guests during opening remarks.
words.exampleSentence: Allow me to welcome the participants who traveled via the cross-border railway.
words.laoTranslation: ຕ້ອນຮັບຜູ້ເຂົ້າຮ່ວມ
words.thaiTranslation: ต้อนรับผู้เข้าร่วมงาน

words.definition: To officially ask an advisor via email to explain a confusing report point.
words.exampleSentence: We need to seek structural clarification regarding the boundary data criteria.
words.laoTranslation: ຂໍຄໍາຊີ້ແຈງເພີ່ມເຕີມ
words.thaiTranslation: ขอคำชี้แจงเชิงโครงสร้างข้อมูล

words.definition: To systematically align daily internal assignments, updates, and syncs.
words.exampleSentence: An app layout can help administrative staff coordinate office activities.
words.laoTranslation: ປະສານງານການເຄື່ອນໄຫວໃນຫ້ອງການ
words.thaiTranslation: ประสานงานกิจกรรมต่างๆ ในสำนักงาน

words.definition: To share an internal operational notice or brief policy message with staff.
words.exampleSentence: The committee plans to distribute a memo about laboratory safety compliance.
words.laoTranslation: ແຈກຢາຍບັນທຶກຂໍ້ຄວາມ
words.thaiTranslation: แจกจ่ายบันทึกข้อความภายใน

words.definition: To state politely in a meeting that you object to a data interpretation or plan.
words.exampleSentence: Do not hesitate to express technical disagreement if the calculations are wrong.
words.laoTranslation: ສະແດงຄວາມຄິດເຫັນຂັດແຍ່ງທາງວິຊາການ
words.thaiTranslation: แสดงความเห็นแย้งทางเทคนิคอย่างสุภาพ

words.definition: To formally end debate on a specific meeting agenda item or forum track.
words.exampleSentence: Since our time is running out, let us close the discussion and vote.
words.laoTranslation: ປິດການສົນທະນາ
words.thaiTranslation: ปิดการอภิปราย / จบประเด็นการสนทนา

words.definition: To adjust a tracking dashboard or tell managers about recent task progress.
words.exampleSentence: Please update the status of your research-related visits on the shared map.
words.laoTranslation: ອັບເດດສະຖານະຄວາມຄືບໜ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: อัปเดตสถานะความคืบหน้า

words.definition: To present the primary, highly influential address at a formal symposium.
words.exampleSentence: The Assistant Professor will deliver a keynote speech on agroforestry frameworks.
words.laoTranslation: ກ່າວປາຖະກະຖາຄັ້ງສໍາຄັນ
words.thaiTranslation: กล่าวปาฐกถาพิเศษบนเวทีใหญ่

words.definition: To act as the neutral facilitator governing an expert debate at a forum.
words.exampleSentence: She was invited to moderate a panel discussion on regional trade dynamics.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນຜູ້ດໍາເນີນການອະພິປາຍຄະນະຊ່ຽວຊານ
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นผู้ดำเนินรายการเสวนาคณะผู้เชี่ยวชาญ

words.definition: To process and merge multiple complicated technical data layers into a clean brief.
words.exampleSentence: Our software tools help researchers synthesize complex data from remote sensors.
words.laoTranslation: ສັງເຄາະຂໍ້ມູນທີ່ຊັບຊ້ອນ
words.thaiTranslation: สังเคราะห์ข้อมูลที่ซับซ้อน

words.definition: To subtly guide team consensus and policy strategies through expert authority.
words.exampleSentence: Senior advisors exert professional influence to drive strict institutional alignment.
words.laoTranslation: ສະແດงອິດທિພົນທາງວິຊາຊີບ
words.thaiTranslation: แสดงอิทธิพลทางวิชาชีพ / บริหารการยอมรับ

words.definition: Relating to relationships or communication between several people in an office team.
words.exampleSentence: Strong interpersonal skills are critical when leading a cross-functional workshop.
words.laoTranslation: ລະຫວ່າງບຸກຄົນ / ມະນຸດສໍາພັນ
words.thaiTranslation: ระหว่างบุคคล / มนุษยสัมพันธ์

words.definition: To enter names or details on an official conference attendee sheet beforehand.
words.exampleSentence: Please pre-register online to secure a seat at the main keynote speech track.
words.laoTranslation: ລົງທະບຽນລ່ວງໜ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: ลงทะเบียนล่วงหน้า

words.definition: To give a team member false, inaccurate, or poorly checked report data by mistake.
words.exampleSentence: We must verify the satellite raster fields so we do not misinform our directors.
words.laoTranslation: ໃຫ້ຂໍ້ມູນຜິດພາດ
words.thaiTranslation: ให้ข้อมูลผิดพลาด / ให้ข้อมูลคลาดเคลื่อน

words.definition: The action of dividing an office presentation structure into separate, clear topics.
words.exampleSentence: A clear subdivision of tasks prevents overlap among our field research teams.
words.laoTranslation: ການແບ່ງຍ່ອຍ / ສ່ວນຍ່ອຍ
words.thaiTranslation: การแบ่งย่อย / ส่วนแยกย่อย

words.definition: A person holding an equivalent position or office post in another organization.
words.exampleSentence: The Assistant Professor shared layout ideas with his technical counterpart in Chiang Mai.
words.laoTranslation: ຕໍາແໜ່ງທີ່ທຽບເທົ່າກັນ / ຄູ່ຮ່ວມງານ
words.thaiTranslation: ผู้ดำรงตำแหน่งพ้อง / คู่สัญญาฝ่ายตรงข้าม

words.definition: A sharp lack of connection or logical alignment between a report data set and reality.
words.exampleSentence: There is a noticeable disconnect between the current budget lines and our field tasks.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມບໍ່ສອດຄ່ອງກັນ / ການຂາດການເຊື່ອມຕໍ່
words.thaiTranslation: ความไม่สอดคล้องกัน / การขาดการเชื่อมโยง

words.definition: The action of working with someone or a group systematically to produce or create something.
words.exampleSentence: Our scientific research is a close collaboration between Souphanouvong University and GIZ.
words.laoTranslation: ການຮ່ວມມື / ການປະສານງານຮ່ວມກັນ
words.thaiTranslation: การร่วมมือ / การทำงานร่วมกัน

words.definition: The degree to which a planned strategy or technological solution is successful in producing a desired result.
words.exampleSentence: We conducted a problem tree framework analysis to test the effectiveness of our soil restoration plan.
words.laoTranslation: ປະສິດທິຜົນ / ຄວາມມີຜົນສັກສິດ
words.thaiTranslation: ประสิทธิผล / ความมีประสิทธิภาพ

words.definition: In a highly convincing manner that alters a panel's mindset during a keynote address.
words.exampleSentence: The speaker argued persuasively for immediate investment in organic gardens.
words.laoTranslation: ຢ່າງມີເຫດຜົນໂນ້ມນ້າວใจ
words.thaiTranslation: อย่างมีเหตุผลโน้มน้าวใจ / อย่างน่าคล้อยตาม

words.definition: An expert facilitator who governs a panel discussion or formal conference session.
words.exampleSentence: The senior advisor acted as the moderator for the regional logistics debate.
words.laoTranslation: ຜູ້ດໍາເນີນລາຍການ / ຜູ້ໄກ່ເກ່ຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ผู้ดำเนินรายการ / ผู้ไกล่เกลี่ยบนเวที

words.definition: Commanding, dependable, and highly respected for possessing profound technical expertise.
words.exampleSentence: The professor delivered an authoritative keynote on forest canopy mapping layouts.
words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ມີອໍານາດສິດຂາດ / ທີ່ໜ້າເຊື່ອຖືສູງ
words.thaiTranslation: ที่มีอำนาจเด็ดขาด / ที่น่าเชื่อถือและเป็นที่ยอมรับ

words.definition: Traveling or extending between two or more major urban centers or municipal towns.
words.exampleSentence: High-speed intercity trains have reduced travel times for cargo across borders.
words.laoTranslation: ລະຫວ່າງເມືອງ / ລະຫວ່າງຕົວເມືອງ
words.thaiTranslation: ระหว่างเมือง / เชื่อมต่อระหว่างเมือง

words.definition: The shipment of goods or containers to an intermediate destination before reaching the final stop.
words.exampleSentence: The dry port handles the transshipment of agricultural goods from truck to rail.
words.laoTranslation: ການຖ່າຍໂອນສິນຄ້າ / ການປ່ຽນຖ່າຍສິນຄ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: การถ่ายลำ / การเปลี่ยนถ่ายสินค้ากลางทาง

words.definition: The process of making predictions about future transport demand or climate shifts using past data.
words.exampleSentence: Accurate demand forecasting prevents bottlenecks at the central railway freight terminal.
words.laoTranslation: ການພະຍາກອນ / ການຄາດຄະເນ
words.thaiTranslation: การพยากรณ์ / การคาดการณ์ล่วงหน้า

words.definition: By land or across the ground rather than by air, sea, or underground pathways.
words.exampleSentence: Eco-tourists prefer traveling overland from Vientiane to Chiang Mai to enjoy local scenery.
words.laoTranslation: ທາງບົກ / ຜ່ານທາງບົກ
words.thaiTranslation: ทางบก / เดินทางผ่านทางบก

words.definition: To relieve absolute structural crowding or traffic blocks in a transit lane or customs gate.
words.exampleSentence: The expansion of the customs clearance yard helped to decongest the primary border crossing.
words.laoTranslation: ຫຼຸດຜ່ອນຄວາມແອອັດ
words.thaiTranslation: ลดความแออัด / ระบายการจราจร

words.definition: Planned, configured, or officially scheduled completely ahead of time.
words.exampleSentence: The regional experts took a pre-arranged shuttle directly to the eco-tourism summit.
words.laoTranslation: ຈັດຕຽມໄວ້ລ່ວງໜ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: จัดเตรียมไว้ล่วงหน้า / นัดหมายไว้ก่อน

words.definition: A minor or secondary pathway split away from the main primary transport corridor grid.
words.exampleSentence: The rural sub-route connects isolated forestry stations to the economic corridor.
words.laoTranslation: ເສັ້ນທາງຍ່おຍ / ສາຍທາງຍ່ອຍ
words.thaiTranslation: เส้นทางย่อย / สายทางย่อย

words.definition: The process of adapting something to modern needs or habits, such as transport grids.
words.exampleSentence: The modernization of the railway line drastically cut down travel times for commuters.
words.laoTranslation: การทำให้ทันสมัย / ການເຮັດໃຫ້ທັນສະໄໝ
words.thaiTranslation: การทำให้ทันสมัย / การปรับปรุงให้ทันสมัย

words.definition: The absolute ease with which people or freight can reach a destination or transit node.
words.exampleSentence: New transport links improved the accessibility of mountainous nature reserves.

words.definition: Done or acting according to a fixed plan, rigorous conceptual pipeline, or clear methodology.
words.exampleSentence: The agency initiated a systematic review of all active climate adaptation projects in the sub-basin.
words.laoTranslation: ຢ່າງເປັນລະບົບວິທີ

words.definition: The friendly and generous reception, entertainment, and hosting of visitors and travelers.

words.definition: The structural action of making the best, most cost-effective use of a route or tool.
words.exampleSentence: Route optimization software cuts fuel consumption for regional distribution fleets.

words.thaiTranslation: การเพิ่มประสิทธิภาพสูงสุด / การปรับระบบให้คุ้มค่าที่สุด

words.definition: The state of being systematically joined or linked up via networks, tracks, or internet paths.
words.exampleSentence: The expansion project aims to boost regional connectivity between remote farm hubs.

words.thaiTranslation: ความสามารถในการเชื่อมต่อ / เครือข่ายการเชื่อมโยง

words.thaiTranslation: อธิปไตย / อำนาจสูงสุดในการปกครองประเทศ

words.definition: A specific way or course taken in getting from a starting point to an infrastructural destination.
words.exampleSentence: The most efficient route for exporting agricultural goods bypasses the narrow mountain roads.

words.thaiTranslation: เส้นทาง / แนวทางการเดินทาง

words.definition: The effective center of an activity, region, network, or logistics infrastructure system.
words.exampleSentence: The town is quickly transforming into a major logistics hub for cross-border transport.

words.thaiTranslation: ศูนย์กลาง / จุดศูนย์รวม

words.definition: Goods or bulk cargo transported systematically via heavy trucks, trains, or large ships.

words.laoTranslation: ສິນຄ້າທີ່ຂົນສົ່ງ / ຄ່າຂົນສົ່ງ
words.thaiTranslation: สินค้าที่ขนส่งทางเรือหรือรถไฟ / บรรทุกสินค้า

words.definition: A specific geographical belt or strip of land linking major trade centers together.
words.exampleSentence: The economic corridor has accelerated trade between the four neighboring nations.
words.laoTranslation: ແລວທາງເສດຖະກິດ / ຊ່ອງທາງເດີນ

words.definition: A designated group of trucks, vehicles, trains, or ships moving under one command ownership.

words.thaiTranslation: กลุ่มรถยนต์หรือเรือในเครือ / กองรถจัดส่ง

words.laoTranslation: ສະຖານີປາຍທາງ / ຄັງຂົນສົ່ງ
words.thaiTranslation: สถานีปลายทาง / ท่าสถานีขนส่ง

words.definition: The official government authority collecting duties and controlling the flow of border items.
words.exampleSentence: The exporter submitted all phytosanitary papers to the border customs officers.
words.laoTranslation: ພາສີ / ຂະແໜງພາສີ
words.thaiTranslation: ศุลกากร / ด่านภาษี

words.definition: Valuable historical architecture, traditions, and cultural traits handed down across centuries.
words.exampleSentence: The town is globally celebrated for its well-preserved architectural heritage.
words.laoTranslation: ມໍລະດົກ / ສິ່ງທີ່ສືບທອດມາ
words.thaiTranslation: มรดกทางวัฒนธรรม / สิ่งที่สืบทอดกันมา

words.definition: A detailed structural plan or schedule listing travel stops, tracks, and session timings.

words.laoTranslation: ແຜນການເດີນທາງ / ລາຍການເດີນທາງ

words.exampleSentence: Upgrading the regional logistics network reduced transit delays for cross-border trains.

words.thaiTranslation: เครือข่ายโลจิสติกส์ / ระบบการขนส่งและจัดจำหน่าย

words.definition: To pass successfully through government checks and pay required cargo import duties.
words.exampleSentence: It took only two hours for the biochar containers to clear customs successfully.
words.laoTranslation: ຜ່ານດ່ານພາສີ
words.thaiTranslation: ผ่านพิธีการศุลกากร / ผ่านด่านภาษี

words.definition: Buses, high-speed rail lines, and transit systems shared collectively by the public.
words.exampleSentence: Investment in clean public transport cuts urban greenhouse gas emissions.
words.laoTranslation: ການຂົນສົ່ງສາທາລະນະ
words.thaiTranslation: ระบบขนส่งมวลชนสาธารณะ

words.definition: The legacy of physical artifacts, intangible attributes, and societal norms inherited from past generations.
words.exampleSentence: Preserving traditional wellness knowledge is an essential aspect of safeguarding local cultural heritage.
words.laoTranslation: ມໍລະດົກທາງວັດທະນະທຳ
words.thaiTranslation: มรดกทางวัฒนธรรม

words.definition: An expert business service company that coordinates regional shipment arrangements.

words.laoTranslation: ຕົວແທນຂົນສົ່ງສິນຄ້າ

words.definition: The systemic process of building or upgrading roads, networks, and utilities.
words.exampleSentence: Cross-border infrastructure development is fueled by railway corridor integration.

words.definition: A location selected for travel focused on experiencing natural wildlife while conserving habitats.

words.thaiTranslation: แหล่งท่องเที่ยวเชิงอนุรักษ์ / จุดหมายปลายทางสีเขียว

words.definition: A state where a street network or rail terminal is choked with vehicles, slowing speed.
words.exampleSentence: The bypass lane was constructed specifically to eliminate heavy traffic congestion.
words.laoTranslation: ການຈະລາຈອນຕິດຂັດ
words.thaiTranslation: ปัญหาการจราจรติดขัดสะสม

words.definition: The precise amount of time elapsed while a cargo lot travels between two nodes.
words.exampleSentence: The direct railway link has slashed transit times by more than forty percent.

words.definition: The designated structural terminal or checkpoint where travelers cross international lines.
words.exampleSentence: We arrived at the border crossing early to complete the phytosanitary checking tracks.

words.definition: An integrated site equipped with container systems located inside a territory away from seas.

words.thaiTranslation: ท่าเรือบก / สถานีตู้สินค้าตากแห้งในประเทศ

words.definition: A detailed structural schedule setting forth paths, tour stops, and lodging points.
words.exampleSentence: The travel itinerary includes a two-day workshop at an agricultural laboratory.
words.laoTranslation: ກໍານົດການເດີນທາງ
words.thaiTranslation: กำหนดการเดินทาง / รายละเอียดทริป

words.definition: A linear geographic route optimized to channel massive streams of passengers and freight.
words.exampleSentence: The transport corridor connects several farming capitals to the economic core.
words.laoTranslation: ແລວທາງການຂົນສົ່ງ
words.thaiTranslation: ระเบียงช่องทางการขนส่งมวลชน

words.definition: A type of rail transport infrastructure operating significantly faster than traditional trains.
words.exampleSentence: The regional high-speed rail network accelerated the movement of perishable agricultural exports.

words.definition: A designated territory governed by unique trade, tariff, and investment regulations.
words.exampleSentence: Many agribusiness firms have established assembly lines inside the special economic zone.

words.definition: The combined structural use of diverse transport modes (rail, truck, air) in one contract.

words.definition: A structural point or node within a supply chain where cargo delays occur rapidly.

words.definition: Agriculture conducted on commercial principles, especially using advanced technology and regional trade lines.

words.definition: The purposeful clearing or permanent removal of forested areas by human activity or unsustainable timber logging.

words.definition: Production of more of a commodity or crop than is needed or can be profitably sold.

words.laoTranslation: ການປັບແຕ່ງເບື້ອງຕົ້ນ / ການກຽມກ່ອນປຸງແຕ່ງ
words.thaiTranslation: การแปรรูปขั้นต้น / การเตรียมวัตถุดิบก่อนการแปรรูป

words.definition: The systematic process of replanting trees on areas of land that were previously stripped or deforested.
words.exampleSentence: The community organized a seasonal reafforestation initiative using native hardwood varieties.
words.laoTranslation: ການປູກປ່າທົດແທນ
words.thaiTranslation: การปลูกป่าทดแทน / การฟื้นฟูพื้นที่ป่าไม้

words.definition: Relating to or characteristic of geographic regions bordering on the tropical zone, suitable for specific cash crops.

words.laoTranslation: ເຂດກິ່ງຮ້ອນ / ເຂດໃກ້ຮ້ອນ
words.thaiTranslation: ภูมิอากาศกึ่งเขตร้อน / เขตใกล้เขตร้อน

words.definition: Relating to plants, functional floral structures, or the specialized scientific study of plant biology.
words.exampleSentence: The native species mobile application tracks specific botanical features for rapid field inventorying.
words.laoTranslation: ທາງພືດສາດ
words.thaiTranslation: ทางพฤกษศาสตร์ / เกี่ยวกับพันธุ์พืช

words.definition: The action or process of adding plant nutrients or balanced compounds to soil to maximize yields.
words.exampleSentence: Organic fertilization through compost additions significantly enhances the nutritional density of garden crops.
words.laoTranslation: ການໃສ່ຝຸ່ນ
words.thaiTranslation: การใส่ปุ๋ย / การบำรุงดิน

words.definition: The complex scientific branch of biology that deals with the relational systems of organisms to their surroundings.
words.exampleSentence: Unregulated logging operations completely destabilize the delicate riverbed ecology of highland valleys.
words.laoTranslation: ນິເວດວິທະຍາ
words.thaiTranslation: นิเวศวิทยา / ความสัมพันธ์ระหว่างสิ่งมีชีวิตกับสิ่งแวดล้อม

words.definition: An area of land and its buildings used for growing crops, managed by independent smallholders.
words.exampleSentence: They set up an experimental farm to evaluate organic roselle variations in Lao soil.
words.laoTranslation: ຟາມ / ສວນ / ໄຮ່ນາ
words.thaiTranslation: ฟาร์ม / ไร่ / สวน

words.definition: A cultivated plant that is grown on a large scale commercially, especially a grain, fruit, or vegetable.
words.exampleSentence: Garlic has become a high-value cash crop for farming families in the northern province.
words.laoTranslation: ພືດຜົນ / ຜົນລະປູກ
words.thaiTranslation: พืชผล / ผลผลิตทางการเกษตร

words.definition: The upper layer of earth in which plants grow, a black or dark brown material typically consisting of organic remains.
words.exampleSentence: Incorporating biochar improves the structural drainage properties of tight clay soil.
words.laoTranslation: ດິນ
words.thaiTranslation: ดิน

words.definition: A flowering plant's unit of reproduction, capable of developing into another such plant.
words.exampleSentence: Always source certified seed to avoid introducing fungal blight into the commercial plots.
words.laoTranslation: ແກ່ນພືດ / ເມັດພັນ
words.thaiTranslation: เมล็ดพันธุ์ / เมล็ดพืช

words.definition: A destructive insect, wildlife form, or biological organism that attacks crops, food stores, or livestock assets.
words.exampleSentence: Integrated management practices reduce dependency on chemical sprays for controlling the chili pest.
words.laoTranslation: ສັດຕູພືດ
words.thaiTranslation: ศัตรูพืช / แมลงทำลายพืช

words.definition: The vital fluid or circulating liquid which circulates nutrients through a vascular plant structural body.
words.exampleSentence: Some local tree species yield valuable aromatic sap used to create high-value wellness essential oils.
words.laoTranslation: ນໍ້າລ້ຽງພືດ / ຢາງໄມ້
words.thaiTranslation: น้ำเลี้ยงในพืช / ยางไม้

words.definition: To selectively reproduce plants or livestock to secure and propagate specific desirable physical attributes.
words.exampleSentence: Agronomists breed specific chili strains to secure high resistance against humid fungal conditions.
words.laoTranslation: ຂະຫຍາຍພັນ / ປະສົມພັນ
words.thaiTranslation: ผสมพันธุ์ / คัดเลือกสายพันธุ์พืช

words.definition: To systematically draw off or clear liquid accumulations from fields using subterranean layout structures or channels.
words.exampleSentence: It is critical to drain low-lying agricultural zones before planting sensitive garlic root sets.
words.laoTranslation: ລະບາຍນໍ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: ระบายน้ำ / ถ่ายเทของเหลวออก

words.definition: The plants of a particular region, habitat, or geological period, considered as a whole.
words.exampleSentence: Biologists compiled a visual catalog showcasing the rare flora native to the northern mountains.
words.laoTranslation: ພືດພັນພື້ນເມືອງ / ພືດສາດ
words.thaiTranslation: พืชพรรณไม้ / พฤกษชาติ

words.definition: The precise branch of forestry involving the structural cultivation, development, and care of forest trees.
words.exampleSentence: Advanced silviculture practices guarantee a continuous timber cycle while maximizing local carbon credits.
words.laoTranslation: ວະນາວັດວິທະຍາ / ການປູກ-ບຳລຸງປ່າ
words.thaiTranslation: วนวัฒนวิทยา / การปลูกและการบำรุงรักษาป่าไม้

words.definition: An agricultural crop which is grown for sale to return a profit rather than for subsistence use.
words.exampleSentence: Introducing garlic as a reliable cash crop boosted average winter revenues across the district.
words.laoTranslation: ພືດເສດຖະກິດ / ພືດເງິນສົດ
words.thaiTranslation: พืชเศรษฐกิจ / พืชทำเงิน

words.definition: The gradual displacement or washing away of the top upper layer of nutrient-rich earth material.
words.exampleSentence: Implementing biochar amendments combined with root covers prevents topsoil erosion along slopes.
words.laoTranslation: ການເຊາະເຈື່ອນຂອງດິນ
words.thaiTranslation: การชะล้างพังทลายของหน้าดิน

words.definition: The total quantifiable amount of an agricultural produce harvested per unit area of land.

words.laoTranslation: ຕົ້ນໄມ້

words.definition: Design or arrange a systematic program for a future academic task or processing goal.

words.definition: The object of a person's ambition or effort; an aim or desired structural end-point.

words.exampleSentence: The academic downloaded a topographical raster to map hydrological flows down the sub-basin.
words.laoTranslation: ຂໍ້ມູນຣາສເຕີພູມສັນຖານ

words.exampleSentence: He participated in a regional speech rating project to validate localization models.

words.exampleSentence: Applying cost frameworks improves strategic decision-making within cooperative unions.

words.definition: To systematically utilize geographic, remote sensing, or satellite information for tracking fields.

words.definition: To systematically design structured action plans or support projects to resolve root problems.

words.laoTranslation: ກຳນົດຮູບແບບການແຊກແຊງ / ສ້າງແຜນງານແກ້ໄຂ

words.definition: To minimize or soften erratic fluctuations in agricultural prices and structural supply paths.
words.exampleSentence: Forward supply contracts help to dampen market volatility for smallholder ginger networks.
words.laoTranslation: ຫຼຸດຜ່ອນຄວາມຜັນຜວນຂອງຕະຫຼາດ
words.thaiTranslation: ลดความผันผวนของตลาด / บรรเทาความผันผวนของราคา

words.definition: To verify through concrete metrics, field observations, or rigorous analysis that a claim is true.
words.exampleSentence: We gathered soil core profiles to validate empirical evidence of carbon sequestration.
words.laoTranslation: ຢັ້ງຢືນຫຼັກຖານທາງປະຈັກຕາ
words.thaiTranslation: พิสูจน์ยืนยันหลักฐานเชิงประจักษ์

words.definition: Having parts or aspects that are not equal or equivalent, particularly regarding access to trade info.
words.exampleSentence: Smallholders often face asymmetric market information when negotiating with cross-border wholesalers.
words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ບໍ່ສົມດຸນກັນ / ບໍ່ສະໝ່ຳສະເໝີ
words.thaiTranslation: ที่ไม่สมดุล / ไม่เท่าเทียมกัน

words.definition: Action taken to improve a situation, especially a structured development pilot project.

words.laoTranslation: ການແຊກແຊງ / ການຈັດຕັ້ງມາດຕະການແກ້ໄຂ
words.thaiTranslation: การแทรกแซง / การดำเนินงานช่วยเหลือแก้ไข

words.definition: Transfer authority or processing facilities from central points to local agricultural cooperative hubs.

words.definition: Estimate something to be smaller or less important than it actually is, such as indirect inputs.

words.definition: Capable of being drawn out, distilled, or separated from a raw botanical or herbal matrix.

words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ສາມາດສະກັດອອກໄດ້
words.thaiTranslation: ที่สามารถสกัดออกมาได้

words.definition: In a fair and impartial manner, ensuring proper distribution of carbon credits or revenues.
words.exampleSentence: The total earnings from the high-value specialty crops must be equitably split across the coop.
words.laoTranslation: ຢ່າງຍຸດຕິທຳ / ຢ່າງສະເໝີພາບ
words.thaiTranslation: อย่างยุติธรรม / อย่างเท่าเทียมกัน

words.definition: An economic system based on private ownership of capital, processing assets, and free trade markets.
words.exampleSentence: Developing smallholder alliances helps local farmers navigate the competitive realities of global capitalism.
words.laoTranslation: ລະບົບທຶນນິຍົມ

words.definition: A general rule, principle, or piece of advice outlining standardized manufacturing operations.
words.exampleSentence: Every processing lab must adhere to the official guideline for handling organic wellness tinctures.
words.laoTranslation: ແນວທາງ / ຂໍ້ກຳນົດແນະນຳ
words.thaiTranslation: แนวทางปฏิบัติ / ข้อบังคับแนะนำ

words.definition: The hard fibrous material that forms the main substance of the trunk or branches of a tree.

words.laoTranslation: ໄມ້
words.thaiTranslation: ไม้ / เนื้อไม้

words.definition: Money in coins or notes, or immediately available funds generated from high-value crop turnover.
words.exampleSentence: Cooperatives require liquid cash reserves to pay smallholders immediately upon harvest delivery.
words.laoTranslation: ເງິນສົດ
words.thaiTranslation: เงินสด

words.definition: An amount of money or resource lost by a business, crop failure, or inefficient post-harvest paths.
words.exampleSentence: Improper sorting before shipping leads to major weight loss and reduced wholesale value.
words.laoTranslation: ການສູນເສຍ / ຜົນຂາດທຶນ

words.definition: Connect or associate one agricultural node or spatial outcome with another root factor.
words.exampleSentence: Spatial models link rapid land degradation directly with uncoordinated upland farming methods.
words.laoTranslation: ເຊື່ອມໂຍງ / ຜູກພັນ
words.thaiTranslation: เชื่อมโยง / ผูกเข้าด้วยกัน

words.definition: A thing that provides a means of achieving or understanding something, such as a primary indicator.

words.laoTranslation: ຈຸດສໍາຄັນ / ກະແຈສໍາຄັນ

words.definition: The uppermost layer of an individual tree or group of trees, forming a dense structural cover.

words.laoTranslation: ເຮືອນຍອດປ່າໄມ້ / ຈອມໄມ້

words.definition: The relative proportion of sand, silt, and clay particles present within an agricultural plot profile.

words.definition: A primary geographic route or infrastructure link dedicated to high-volume cargo and freight transport.
words.exampleSentence: The regional railway functions as a core transit corridor unlocking rapid border trade agreements.
words.laoTranslation: ແລວທາງການຂົນສົ່ງ / ເສັ້ນທາງຜ່ານ

words.definition: A dividend payment made in the form of additional shares rather than pure cash payouts.
words.exampleSentence: The individual tracks his interactive brokerage notifications to register every incoming stock dividend.

words.definition: The systematic process of cleaning, parsing, modeling, and rendering metrics to extract insights.

words.definition: A starting point or standard value measured at the beginning of a study against which progress is tracked.

words.exampleSentence: Smallholder garlic growers in the mountain districts constitute the primary target group for the technical grant.

words.definition: The direct, tangible goods, services, or documentation produced as a result of a planned activity.
words.exampleSentence: The mobile data application is the primary project output of the native species mapping venture.

words.definition: A high-quality choice or substitute that provides equal or superior opportunity cost returns.

words.definition: To distribute inputs, spatial assets, or project funding in the most efficient manner possible.

words.definition: To conceptually integrate descriptive text observations, interview notes, and root logs into a schema.

words.laoTranslation: ສັງເຄາະຂໍ້ມູນທາງຄຸນນະພາບ

words.definition: The act of registering or recording analytical variables or trade frameworks in advance.

words.definition: A political and economic theory of social organization which advocates that production is community-managed.
words.exampleSentence: The country's implementation of market socialism allows collaborative agricultural coops to thrive.
words.laoTranslation: ລະບົບສັງຄົມນິຍົມ

words.definition: Relating to or using logical analysis to unpack problem statements or raster data grids.

words.laoTranslation: ທາງດ້ານການວິເຄາະ / ທີ່ມີການຄິດວິເຄາະ
words.thaiTranslation: เชิงวิเคราะห์ / ที่มีตรรกะในการแยกแยะ

words.definition: A thing that is compulsory; a necessary condition for qualifying for export standard marks.
words.exampleSentence: Meeting strict organic residue parameters is a baseline requirement for entry into the market.
words.laoTranslation: ຂໍ້ກຳນົດ / ເງື່ອນໄຂຈໍາເປັນ
words.thaiTranslation: ข้อกำหนด / เงื่อนไขที่จำเป็น

words.definition: The part of the earth's surface that is not covered by water, used for agrarian expansion.
words.exampleSentence: Delineating communal land zones protects native timber reserves from illegal conversion.
words.laoTranslation: ດິນ / ຜືນດິນ

words.definition: A flattened structure of a higher plant, typically green and bladelike, processing light energy.
words.exampleSentence: The technician sampled the broad leaf tissue to check for potential trace chemical residues.
words.laoTranslation: ໃບໄມ້
words.thaiTranslation: ใบไม้

words.definition: The action of moving along in a steady, continuous stream, like transit freight loops.
words.exampleSentence: Opening the high-speed railway corridor has optimized the physical flow of agricultural items.
words.laoTranslation: ການໄຫຼວຽນ / ກະແສການຂົນສົ່ງ
words.thaiTranslation: การไหลเวียน / การไหลบ่าของสินค้า

words.definition: The capital raised by a business or corporation through the issue and subscription of shares.
words.exampleSentence: He maintains a diversified portfolio of international technology stock assets inside his account.
words.laoTranslation: ຮຸ້ນ / ຄັງສິນຄ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: หุ้น / สินค้าในคลัง

words.definition: The lowest or supporting part of something, or the baseline layer of a spatial vector calculation.
words.exampleSentence: The field team established a permanent research base near the protected watershed perimeter.
words.laoTranslation: ຖານ / ຖານທີ່ໝັ້ນ
words.thaiTranslation: ฐาน / จุดตั้งต้น

words.definition: A certified set of criteria governing crop purity, heavy metal residues, and sorting practices.
words.exampleSentence: Establishing a central office helps farmers meet every strict international agricultural standard.
words.laoTranslation: ມາດຕະຖານກະສິກຳ
words.thaiTranslation: มาตรฐานทางการเกษตร

words.definition: The active management of returning degraded woodlands to their original rich ecological architecture.
words.exampleSentence: Local budgets were allocated to community nurseries to scale up native forest restoration initiatives.
words.laoTranslation: ການຟື້ນຟູປ່າໄມ້
words.thaiTranslation: การฟื้นฟูพื้นป่า / การฟื้นฟูสภาพป่า

words.definition: A botanical hot drink blend processed from therapeutic items like dried roselle or ginger.
words.exampleSentence: Exporting vacuum-packed wellness tea to nearby markets generates premium earnings for the union.
words.laoTranslation: ຊາເພື່ອສຸຂະພາບ
words.thaiTranslation: ชาเพื่อสุขภาพ

words.definition: A vertical section of earth showing its distinct structural layers from organic topsoil to bedrock.
words.exampleSentence: Analyzing the soil profile reveals whether the field possesses sufficient moisture retention.
words.laoTranslation: ຊັ້ນໜ້າດິນ / ຮູບແບບຊັ້ນດິນ
words.thaiTranslation: หน้าตัดดิน / ลักษณะชั้นดิน

words.definition: A structured system of railways, highways, and border custom ports enabling cargo transfer.
words.exampleSentence: The regional transit network dramatically reduces the time required to deliver fresh garlic bulbs.
words.laoTranslation: ເຄືອຂ່າຍການຂົນສົ່ງ / ລະບົບການຄົມມະນາຄົມ
words.thaiTranslation: เครือข่ายการขนส่ง / ระบบคมนาคมขนส่ง

words.definition: An official update sent by a brokerage house indicating that corporate shares earned returns.
words.exampleSentence: He received an automated dividend notification from Interactive Brokers regarding his stock holdings.
words.laoTranslation: ການແຈ້ງເຕືອນເງິນປັນຜົນ

words.definition: The process of examining geographic locations and patterns using remote sensing or vectors.
words.exampleSentence: Completing a thorough spatial analysis requires downloading multiple topographic raster archives.
words.laoTranslation: ການວິເຄາະທາງພື້ນທີ່ / ການວິເຄາະແຜນທີ່
words.thaiTranslation: การวิเคราะห์เชิงพื้นที่

words.definition: The core initial datasets compiled at a project's onset to track subsequent progress layers.
words.exampleSentence: Field researchers uploaded their baseline data to the cloud before deploying the AppSheet forms.
words.laoTranslation: ຂໍ້ມູນພື້ນຖານ / ຂໍ້ມູນຕັ້ງຕົ້ນ
words.thaiTranslation: ข้อมูลพื้นฐาน / ข้อมูลเริ่มต้นสำหรับเปรียบเทียบ

words.definition: The specific community group or village sector intended to receive development aid inputs.
words.exampleSentence: Upland farmers growing specialty herbs represent the prime target population for this grant.
words.laoTranslation: ປະຊາກອນເປົ້າໝາຍ
